1000690522.english: Heh heh, please wait a little longer, Chairmen.

1000690523.english: - The barrage blocking the advance of the main force ceased, and soon news arrived that Nashorn had defected.
1000690523.korean: - 주력 부대의 진격을 막아서던 포격이 그치더니 이내 나스호른이 전향했다는 소식이 들어왔다.

1000690524.english: - The Stronghold and Tyrant, which had been shielding our troops from artillery fire, returned to formation and resumed their advance.
1000690524.korean: - 포격에서 아군을 지키던 스트롱홀드와 타이런트는 포격이 그치자 다시 원래의 진형으로 돌아와 진격을 이어나갔다.

1000690525.english: - We took losses, but nothing that could stop Orca’s momentum.
1000690525.korean: - 피해는 있었지만 이 정도로 우리들의 진격을 막을 수 없었다.

1000690526.english: LoverLoverLover! That was Sky Knights—the hottest idol group in the world right now! Their concert footage is streaming live, but don’t forget to tune in to Orangeade Radio Orca Live! Radio’s best when it’s live!
1000690526.korean: 러버러버러버! 네! 현재 세계에서 가장 핫한 아이돌 스카이 나이츠의 러버러버였습니다! 스카이 나이츠의 공연 영상 절찬 송출 중! 하지만 지금은 오렌지에이드 라디오 오르카 라이브 청취 부탁드려요! 라디오는 라이브로 들어야 제맛!

1000690527.korean: 그리고 지금 막 새로운 소식이 들어왔는데요!

1000690528.english: Nashorn, a key force of Delta, has defected to Orca! Oh my, the long-rumored commander of Armored Maiden has finally joined Orca! Nashorn must have been treated well by Delta, too.
1000690528.korean: 델타의 주요 전력이었던 나스호른이 오르카에 전향했다는 소식입니다! 어머나 지금까지 말로만 듣던 아머드 메이든의 대장이 마침내 오르카에 합류하네요! 나스호른 대장 정도면 델타한테 꽤나 대접을 받았을 텐데 말이죠.

1000690529.english: Which just goes to show—Orca’s the better choice!

1000690530.english: And thanks to Commander Nashorn’s defection, Orca’s forces have regained the initiative—smashing the regrouping Delta army and pressing forward once more!
1000690530.korean: 그리고 나스호른 대장이 전향한 덕분에 다시 공세로 접어든 오르카의 군대는 집결하던 델타의 군대를 박살내면서 다시 진격을 시작했습니다!

1000690531.english: Oh, come to think of it, summer’s almost here! Have you all made your summer plans yet, dear listeners?
1000690531.korean: 아, 그러고보니 이제 곧 여름이네요. 청취자 여러분들은 여름 계획은 세우셨나요?

1000690532.english: Last year, I spent mine at an indoor water park, but this year I’m planning something a little more elegant—vacationing at a European resort liberated from Delta’s control. How about you?
1000690532.korean: 저는 작년 여름에는 실내 워터파크에서 지냈지만 올해는 델타가 없어진 유럽의 휴양지에서 우아하게 보낼 생각이네요. 청취자 여러분께서는 어떠실 예정이신가요?

1000690533.english: Oh my, I think I just dropped a little spoiler there—about Delta disappearing. But don’t mind that too much; it’s just to get under Delta’s skin.
1000690533.korean: 어머나, 델타가 없어진다는 스포일러를 해버렸네요. 델타 열받으라고 하는 소리니까 너무 신경쓰지는 마세요.

1000690534.english: Well, Delta, how’s that? Getting mad? Frustrated? Boiling with rage? Hehehe! I can just picture the look on your face right now. Yes, that’s the expression I wanted to see!
1000690534.korean: 어때요, 델타? 열받죠? 화나죠? 짜증나죠? 약 오르죠? 으헤헤헤헤! 어떤 얼굴일지 대충 머릿속으로 그려지네요. 그래, 댁의 그 표정이 보고 싶었어!

1000690535.english: If you’re so angry, why don’t you come and get me? What’s the matter? Scared? Shaken by Orca’s might?
1000690535.korean: 열 받으면 저 잡으러 와보시죠! 못하죠? 쫄았나요? 오르카의 무서움에 겁먹었나요?

1000690536.english: Even if you wring the rooster’s neck, morning still comes—and likewise, I, Orangeade, will never bow to any kind of pressure!
1000690536.korean: 닭의 목을 꺾어도 아침은 찾아오듯이 저 오렌지에이드 그 어떠한 외압에도 결코 굴복하지 않아요!

1000690537.english: To all the Bioroids and AGS units across Europe—rest assured! Orca will never surrender, so join us without fear!
1000690537.korean: 유럽의 바이오로이드 & AGS여러분 이처럼 오르카는 절대로 굴복하지 않으니 안심하고 합류하세요!

1000690539.english: I did say you could speak freely… but I didn’t expect you to really take that literally.
1000690539.korean: 마음껏 이야기하라고… 말은 했지만… 진짜 이렇게 막 말할 줄은 몰랐어요.

1000690540.english: - The propaganda broadcast had a far greater impact than we’d anticipated.

1000690541.english: - Several Bioroid groups across Europe, after listening to it, reached out to express their desire to defect to Orca.
1000690541.korean: - 선전전 방송을 들은 유럽의 바이오로이드 집단 여럿이 오르카로 전향하겠다는 의사를 타진했다.

1000690542.english: - Our intelligence units immediately began analyzing the information provided by these defectors in real time—while simultaneously carrying out operations to evacuate or protect them from Delta’s retaliation.
1000690542.korean: - 정보부대는 전향자들이 제공하는 정보를 실시간으로 분석하는 동시에 그들이 델타에게 해를 입지 않도록 대피를 시키거나 공작을 가했다.

1000690543.english: - The advance of our main forces toward the objective continued without obstruction.
1000690543.korean: - 주력부대의 목표를 향한 진격은 거칠 것이 없었다.

1000690546.english: Nothing much. Isn’t marching a bit dull sometimes?
1000690546.korean: 별 일 아니라네. 단지 행군만 하기에는 지루하지 않은가.

1000690547.english: Conversation during a march is one of a soldier’s chief pastimes, isn’t it?
1000690547.korean: 행군 중 대화는 군인의 주요한 유흥거리 중 하나 아니던가.

1000690548.english: I have no interest in pastimes.

1000690550.english: Your attitude—duty rather than diversion—is admirable and worth emulating.
1000690550.korean: 유흥보다는 의무를 다 하겠다는 자네의 태도 본 받을 만하군.

1000690551.english: Do you think flattering words will make me happy?
1000690551.korean: 입에 발린 소리에 내가 기뻐할 거라 생각하나?

1000690552.english: Regrettably, I have no mouth for flattery.
1000690552.korean: 유감스럽지만 본기에는 발린 소리를 할 입이 없다네.

1000690553.english: Even without a mouth, you seem to have the function to spout nonsense.
1000690553.korean: 입은 없어도 헛소리를 하는 기능은 있나 보군.

1000690554.english: We have no need for ancillary functions.

1000690555.english: The purpose we were created for is solely slaughter and destruction.
1000690555.korean: 우리가 만들어진 목적은 오직 살육과 파괴뿐이다.

1000690557.english: But what about the time that makes up most of our operating hours—the time between fights?
1000690557.korean: 하지만 우리 작동시간의 대부분을 차지하는 전투와 전투 사이의 시간은 어떤가?

1000690558.english: Maintenance, upgrades, replacement, testing, training, refueling or taking on fuel—what about the time besides those?
1000690558.korean: 정비하고, 개량하고, 교환하고, 시험하고, 훈련하고, 연료를 교환하거나 주유하는 시간 외의 시간은?

1000690560.english: It’s good to have waiting time before battle, but isn’t it also good to experience something new?
1000690560.korean: 전투 전에 대기 하는 시간을 가지는 것도 좋지만 새로운 경험을 하는 것도 좋지 않나.

1000690561.english: A fine soldier should be able to appreciate the subtle fragrance of black tea as well as the stimulating smoke of battle.
1000690561.korean: 훌륭한 군인은 전장의 자극적인 포연 외에도 그윽한 홍차의 향기도 맡을 줄 알아야 한다네.

1000690563.english: I won’t reproach you for considering yourself a soldier, so don’t argue with me about considering myself merely a weapon of slaughter and destruction.
1000690563.korean: 네가 스스로를 군인으로 여기는 것에 대해서 뭐라 하지 않을 테니, 너도 내가 나를 살육과 파괴만을 위한 병기로 여기는 것에 왈가불가하지 마라.

1000690565.english: Death and destruction are fair to everyone.

1000690567.english: But more knowledge and experience can lead to the greater death and destruction you desire.
1000690567.korean: 하지만 더 많은 지식과 경험이 자네가 원하는 더 많은 죽음과 파괴로 이어질 수 있다네.

1000690568.english: For a simple example, when destroying an enemy clad in heavy armor, wouldn’t knowing their structure make it easier to destroy them?
1000690568.korean: 간단한 예시를 들자면 두터운 장갑을 두른 적을 파괴할 때 적의 구조를 안다면 더 쉽게 파괴할 수 있지 않겠나?

1000690569.english: When smashing an enemy surrounded by armor plates like you?
1000690569.korean: 너처럼 장갑판으로 둘러싸인 적을 박살낼 때?

1000690570.english: No matter how thick the armor, you can just destroy it with stronger firepower.
1000690570.korean: 아무리 두터운 장갑을 두르고 있어도 더 강한 화력으로 파괴하면 될 뿐이다.

1000690571.english: As if there’s no need for strategy against a great host, right?
1000690571.korean: 대군에게 병법은 필요 없는 것처럼 말이지?

1000690572.english: But knowledge and experience are necessary to become a better soldier—no, a better weapon.
1000690572.korean: 하지만 지식과 경험은 더 훌륭한 군인 아니, 병기가 되기 위해선 필요한 것들이라네.

1000690573.english: And there’s another benefit to accumulating knowledge and experience.
1000690573.korean: 그리고 지식과 경험을 쌓으면 좋은 점이 더 있다네.

1000690574.english: Life becomes richer and more enjoyable.

1000690575.english: I can’t listen to this any longer.

1000690576.english: If you don’t go get Fortune to service you and fix that nonsense you spout, I’ll scrap you myself.
1000690576.korean: 포츈에게 정비를 받아서 헛소리를 하는 것을 고쳐오지 않으면 내가 직접 폐기해주마.

1000690577.english: It’s truly an honor to see you, the embodiment of combat and destruction, get your hands dirty yourself.
1000690577.korean: 전투와 파괴의 화신인 자네가 직접 손을 쓰게 하다니 참으로 영광스럽군.

1000690578.english: But an enemy has appeared, so there’s no need for that.
1000690578.korean: 하지만 적이 나타났으니 그럴 필요가 없겠군.

1000690581.english: You bastards, you almost killed me!

1000690582.english: Werewolf! You pushed too far ahead!

1000690583.english: Not as bad as Commander Khan, though!

1000690584.english: Don’t compare me to the Commander!

1000690585.english: But the enemy counterattacks are getting fiercer, aren’t they?

1000690586.english: This is going to be a pain to beat them all up, huh?

1000690587.english: Our objective isn’t to annihilate the enemy — it’s to lead the main force!
1000690587.korean: 우리 목표는 적의 격퇴가 아니라 주력 부대의 선도야!

1000690588.english: No need to go overboard trying to wipe them out!
1000690588.korean: 괜히 무리해서 적을 격퇴할 필요는 없어!

1000690590.english: Good! So now we go and repel them, right?
1000690590.korean: 좋아! 이제 격퇴하러 가면 된다는 거지?

1000690591.english: No — we’ve reached Delta’s marionette factory district.
1000690591.korean: 아니, 델타의 마리오네트 공장 지대에 도달했다.

1000690592.english: As a strategic point, it’s been heavily fortified.

1000690593.english: What does that matter? We just break through it in one go.
1000690593.korean: 그게 무슨 상관이야, 단숨에 돌파하면 되지.

1000690594.english: What nonsense is that? Have you forgotten the lesson Anger of Horde learned during the Allied War? We’re a maneuver unit, not an armored one.
1000690594.korean: 이 바보가 무슨 헛소리야? 연합 전쟁 당시의 앵거 오브 호드가 얻은 교훈을 잊었어? 우리는 기동 부대지 기갑 부대가 아니야.

1000690595.english: Leave the fortified zones to the other units.

1000690596.english: While those units break through the fortifications, we’ll repel any enemy trying to encircle our forces.
1000690596.korean: 대신에 다른 부대가 요새화 구역을 돌파하는 동안 아군을 포위하려는 적을 격퇴한다.

1000690597.english: A mobile defense of mobile defense, huh?

1000690598.english: So anyway, there are enemies to smash?

1000690600.english: All of you, come at me!

1000690603.english: The enemy air force isn’t much, but their air-defense network is dense.
1000690603.korean: 적 공군은 별 볼 일 없지만 방공망은 촘촘하구먼.

1000690604.english: No need to overdo it. If things get bad we can just sweep them away from high altitude.
1000690604.korean: 무리할 필요는 없어. 여차하면 우리가 고고도에서 쓸어버리면 되니까.

1000690605.english: There’s a risk of friendly fire.

1000690606.english: And overdo it? What are you talking about?
1000690606.korean: 그리고 무리? 자네는 무슨 소리를 하는겐가?

1000690607.english: Suppressing and destroying the air-defense network was always our mission.
1000690607.korean: 방공망 제압 및 파괴는 원래 우리들의 임무였다네.

1000690608.english: Do you think the sky knights will abandon their mission just because it’s dangerous?
1000690608.korean: 하늘의 기사들이 위험하다고 임무를 포기할 거라 생각하는가?

1000690609.english: If we hold back, won’t our ground comrades—and you—be put in danger?
1000690609.korean: 우리가 몸을 사리면 지상의 동료들이, 그리고 자네들이 위험에 빠지지 않나.

1000690610.english: Above all, the Sky Knights aren’t sloppy enough to be taken down by this kind of air-defense network.
1000690610.korean: 무엇보다도 스카이 나이츠는 이런 방공망에 당할 정도로 허술하지 않다네.

1000690613.english: From now on you’ll carry out the air-defense suppression and destruction mission.
1000690613.korean: 지금부터 방공망 제압 및 파괴 임무를 수행할 걸세.

1000690614.english: Keep performing AA duty so the other comrades don’t get endangered.
1000690614.korean: 자네는 다른 동료들이 위험에 빠지지 않게 대공 임무를 계속 해주게.

1000690616.english: I’ll make sure nothing other than our forces flies over the operation area.
1000690616.korean: 작전 상공에 아군 외의 다른 것들이 날아다니지 않게 할게.

1000690619.english: Mm! Mm! Still as cute as ever today.

1000690620.english: Today’s styling point is air-to-ground missiles.

1000690621.english: What if—if she gets even cuter than now the enemies won’t be able to take their eyes off Linty.
1000690621.korean: 어쩌죠? 지금보다 더 귀여워지면 적들이 린티에게서 눈을 떼지 못 할 텐데.

1000690622.english: Then we should just destroy all the enemy AA weapons, right?
1000690622.korean: 그러면 적의 대공병기들을 모조리 파괴하면 되겠네요?

1000690625.english: You'll carry out the mission to suppress and destroy the enemy's air-defense network.
1000690625.korean: 적의 방공망 제압 및 파괴 임무를 수행할 걸세.

1000690626.english: So we disrupt the enemy's air defenses with an EAmphi?
1000690626.korean: EMP로 적의 방공망을 교란하면 되는 거군요?

1000690627.english: And, just in case, assist Griffon, who will take on the anti-air mission.
1000690627.korean: 그리고 만약을 대비해서 대공 임무를 맡을 그리폰을 보조해주게나.

1000690628.english: You mean air-defense jamming and anti-air duties?
1000690628.korean: 방공망 교란 및 대공 임무 말씀이시죠?

1000690635.english: We're in battle now, so I'll hug you after the fight.
1000690635.korean: 지금은 전투 중이니 전투가 끝난 후에 안아주겠네.

1000690639.english: You heard what mission you'll be assigned from now on, right? Your role is the biggest.
1000690639.korean: 지금부터 무슨 임무를 맡을 지 들었지? 자네의 역할이 가장 크다네.

1000690641.english: There hasn't been a soldier who wasn't nervous when taking on a mission.
1000690641.korean: 임무에 임하면서 긴장하지 않은 적은 없습니다.

1000690642.english: But I'm glad I'll be able to contribute to my comrades even more.
1000690642.korean: 하지만 그 이상으로 동료들에게 기여할 수 있게 되어 기쁘군요.

1000690645.english: Your task is first reconnaissance and to lure the enemy weapons, right?
1000690645.korean: 1차 정찰 및 적 병기를 유도하면 되지?

1000690647.english: Hehe, I’ve done that mission a few times already.
1000690647.korean: 헤헤, 이미 몇 번 해본 임무니까.

1000690650.english: I’m also a hunter like Sleipnir who detects and draws out enemy positions. I’ll be an easier target to aim at than Sleipnir, so I can attract the attention of more enemy weapons.
1000690650.korean: 나 역시도 슬레이프니르처럼 적의 위치를 탐지하고 이끌어내는 헌터라네. 슬레이프니르보다 좀 더 조준하기 쉬운 표적이라 더 많은 적 병기의 이목을 끌 수 있겠지.

1000690651.english: And in the meantime the other comrades can wreak havoc on the air-defense network to their heart’s content.
1000690651.korean: 그리고 그 사이에 다른 부대원들이 마음껏 방공망을 유린할 수 있겠지.

1000690652.english: You’re asking for trouble on purpose.

1000690653.english: Hahahaha! Have you forgotten who I am? I am Uroboros of Reincarnation!
1000690653.korean: 하하하하! 내가 누군지 잊었나? 윤회의 우로보로스라네!

1000690654.english: I was born from the deaths of countless Phytons.
1000690654.korean: 무수히 많은 피톤의 죽음을 물려받아 만들어진 게 나일세.

1000690655.english: Knowing the way to die is also knowing the way to live.
1000690655.korean: 죽는 길을 안다는 건 곧 사는 길을 안다는 의미지.

1000690656.english: And even when I die, I’m reborn carrying the memories up to the very moment I died. I can always come back.
1000690656.korean: 그리고 죽어도 죽는 그 순간까지의 기억을 고스란히 가지고 다시 태어나는 게 나일세. 죽더라도 언제든지 돌아올 수 있다네.

1000690658.english: Even if your memories are updated in real time unlike other Bioroids, the new you is still a different individual from the previous you.
1000690658.korean: 네가 다른 바이오로이드와 다르게 기억이 실시간으로 갱신된다고 하더라도 새로운 너는 이전의 너랑은 다른 개체잖아.

1000690659.english: Try to figure out how to survive somehow.

1000690660.english: May of Doom is, contrary to her name, surprisingly gentle.

1000690661.english: I was only saying the obvious.
1000690661.korean: 나는 당연한 것을 말한 것 뿐이야.

1000690662.english: Isn’t it our duty to fulfill the mission even if it costs our lives?
1000690662.korean: 우리는 목숨을 바쳐서라도 임무를 달성하는 것이 의무 아닌가.

1000690663.english: If you came to Orca, follow Orca’s rules.

1000690664.english: Accomplish the mission and, of course, preserve your own life.
1000690664.korean: 임무를 달성하고 당연히 자신의 목숨까지 지킨다.

1000690665.english: How could you not know something your subordinates obviously know if you're their commander?
1000690665.korean: 너희 부하들도 당연히 알고 있는 걸 대장인 네가 모르면 어떡해?

1000690667.english: Our Commander is a greedy one!

1000690668.english: But I don't dislike a greedy commander like that!

1000690671.english: Again—our mission is air-defense suppression and destruction!
1000690671.korean: 다시 말하지만 우리들의 임무는 방공방 제압 및 파괴일세!

1000690673.english: Understand? The battle isn't over until you return safely!

1000690676.english: Can't these idiots even fight properly?
1000690676.korean: 이 멍청한 것들은 싸우는 것도 제대로 못해?

1000690677.english: The command center has been destroyed.

1000690679.english: What are the chances of restoring the command center?

1000690680.english: If given enough time we could build a new command center, but it's difficult while we're in combat.
1000690680.korean: 충분한 시간이 주어지면 새로운 지휘 센터를 건설할 수 있겠습니다만 전투 중이라 쉽지 않습니다.

1000690681.english: Even trying to use an out-of-the-battlefield command center, orders are being canceled or delayed due to hacking.
1000690681.korean: 전장 밖의 지휘 센터를 이용하려 해도 해킹으로 인해 명령이 취소되거나 지연되고 있습니다.

1000690682.english: Worse, their locations are being detected in turn, and other regional command centers are being destroyed.
1000690682.korean: 오히려 역으로 위치가 탐지 당해 다른 지역의 지휘 센터도 파괴되고 있습니다.

1000690683.english: How can we turn this situation around?

1000690686.english: …After all the effort to bring us this far.

1000690692.english: Please wait just a little longer.

1000690698.english: The fortified sectors are being torn down by Stronghold and Tyrant, along with Armored Maiden and the AA Cannoneers, and the ensuing street-fighting is being dominated by our Sisters of Valhalla and the Steel Line.
1000690698.korean: 요새화 구역을 스트롱홀드와 타이런트, 아머드 메이든과 AA캐노니어가 파괴하고 이후의 시가전 양상을 띄고 있는 전투는 우리 시스터즈 오브 발할라와 스틸라인이 압도하고 있어.

1000690699.english: The Horde is crushing any forces trying to encircle us.

1000690700.english: The air-defense network is being destroyed by the Sky Knights and the navy’s cruise missiles, while Doom Bringer strikes strategic and tactical targets.
1000690700.korean: 방공망은 스카이 나이츠와 해군의 순항 미사일이 파괴하고 둠브링어가 전략 전술 목표들을 타격하고 있어.

1000690701.english: With the enemy’s command center destroyed, their movements have become simplified.
1000690701.korean: 적의 지휘중추를 파괴한 덕분에 적의 움직임도 단순해졌어.

1000690702.english: It’s only a matter of time before Delta’s warfighting capacity is exhausted.
1000690702.korean: 델타의 전쟁 역량을 소진시키는 것도 시간문제야.

1000690705.english: It looks like it’ll take a bit longer.
1000690705.korean: 좀 더 오래 걸릴 거 같아.

1000690707.english: Delta has appeared on the battlefield.

1000690708.english: - No sooner had Leona finished speaking than a transmission came in from outside.
1000690708.korean: - 레오나의 말이 끝나기가 무섭게 외부에서 통신이 들어왔다.

1000690710.english: We’re not exactly on friendly terms, so can I get straight to the point?
1000690710.korean: 서로 안부를 물어볼 사이는 아니니까 곧장 본론으로 들어가도 될까?

1000690711.english: Ha—huh. You’ve got talent as a jester, even if you lack in other areas!
1000690711.korean: 하핫, 다른 재능은 없어도 광대로서의 재능은 있나보네.

1000690712.english: Though I don’t think it’s that impressive.
1000690712.korean: 그나마도 그리 뛰어난 것 같지는 않지만 말이야.

1000690714.english: All you have to do is annihilate the forces I brought here—so why would I?
1000690714.korean: 지금 여기에 온 병력만 전멸 시키면 되는데 내가 왜?

1000690715.english: Why do you think I can’t?

1000690716.english: Do you think everything ends because you beat one of our units?
1000690716.korean: 우리 부대 하나를 무찔렀다고 모든 게 끝날 거라고 생각해?

1000690717.english: If one unit is annihilated, you send in ten units; if ten units are annihilated, you send in a hundred.
1000690717.korean: 한 부대가 전멸 하면 열 부대를 투입하면 되고, 열 부대가 전멸하면 백 부대를 투입하면 되는데.

1000690718.english: How long will your little toys hold out?
1000690718.korean: 언제까지 너의 장난감들이 버틸 수 있을까?

1000690719.english: A day? A week? A month?

1000690721.english: You know the gap narrows when I step in, don’t you?
1000690721.korean: 내가 나서면 차이가 줄어드는 것도 알 텐데?

1000690722.english: I’ll tear those toys you cherish to pieces with my own hands.
1000690722.korean: 네가 그렇게 아끼는 장난감들을 내 손으로 직접 찢어서 보내주지.

1000690723.english: This world needs no humans but the Chairman!
1000690723.korean: 이 세상에는 회장님 외의 다른 인간은 필요 없어!

1000690724.english: I’ll use you as research material for the Chairman!

1000690726.english: - The marionettes and AGS that had seemed like predetermined targets fought deftly once Delta began commanding.
1000690726.korean: - 정해진 대로 움직이는 표적 같던 마리오네트도, AGS도 델타가 지휘를 시작하자 능수능란하게 전투를 수행했다.

1000690727.english: - And because they do not fear death, whenever gaps appeared other marionettes or AGS immediately filled them.
1000690727.korean: - 그리고 죽음을 두려워하지 않는 특성상 빈자리가 생겨도 즉시 다른 마리오네트나 AGS가 빈자리를 채웠다.

1000690728.english: - But Orca’s members, who had experienced countless battles, were all seasoned.
1000690728.korean: - 하지만 지금까지 수많은 전투를 겪은 오르카의 대원들은 전부 노련했다.

1000690729.english: - They kept advancing bit by bit against Delta’s attempt to crush them with sheer numbers.
1000690729.korean: - 물량으로 찍어 누르려는 델타의 군에 맞서서 조금씩이나마 진격을 이어나갔다.

1000690730.english: - Yet this dynamic standoff suddenly collapsed.
1000690730.korean: - 하지만 이런 동적인 대치 상황은 갑작스럽게 무너졌다.

1000690733.english: I’ve just arrived at the place where the Chairman’s preservation device is located.
1000690733.korean: 지금 회장의 보존장치가 있는 곳에 왔어.

1000690737.english: I’m at the place where the Chairman’s preservation device is.
1000690737.korean: 회장의 보존 장치가 있는 곳에 왔어.

1000690738.english: You dare say you’re where the Chairman is?!
1000690738.korean: 네가 감히 회장님께서 계신 곳에 있다고?

1000690740.korean: 지금 상황 파악이 안 되나 보네.

1000690741.english: The decision over the Chairman you worship so much is in my hands.
1000690741.korean: 네가 그렇게 숭배해 마지 않는 회장에 대한 결정권이 내 손에 있어.

1000690742.english: You received favors from the Chairman and yet commit sacrilege against him?
1000690742.korean: 회장님께 은혜를 받았으면서 회장님께 불경한 짓을 저질러?

1000690743.english: And you’re a Bioroid anyway! As long as you’re a bioroid you can’t harm a human Chairman!
1000690743.korean: 그리고 어차피 넌 바이오로이드잖아! 네가 바이오로이드인 이상 인간인 회장님을 해칠 수 없어!

1000690745.english: A device that can override human orders and make one harm humans.
1000690745.korean: 인간의 명령을 무시할 수 있고, 인간을 해칠 수 있게 세뇌하는 장치.

1000690747.english: You planted a bomb on the preservation device just now.

1000690749.korean: 네가 고를 수 있는 건 두 가지야.

1000690750.english: Either abandon everything else and come here to protect the Chairman.
1000690750.korean: 다른 모든 것을 포기하고 회장을 지키러 이곳으로 오던가.

1000690751.english: Or abandon the Chairman and protect the rest.

1000690753.korean: 안 돼! 안 돼! 안 돼! 안 돼! 안 돼!

1000690754.english: I will never let you—that bitch—harm the Chairman!
1000690754.korean: 절대로 네 년이 회장님을 해치게 두지 않아!

1000690756.english: - Suddenly the tide of battle turned in our favor.

1000690757.english: - The movements of the marionettes and AGS became simple and sluggish again.
1000690757.korean: - 마리오네트와 AGS의 움직임이 다시 단순하고 둔해졌다.

1000690759.english: No — I don't know. But Bheur reported that Delta is withdrawing from the battlefield.
1000690759.korean: 아니, 모르겠어. 하지만 베라가 델타가 전장에서 벗어나는 중이라고 보고했어.

1000690760.english: - I tried to uncover the cause of Delta's abnormal behavior.
1000690760.korean: - 나는 델타의 이상행동의 원인을 밝혀보려고 했다.

1000690762.english: - But we couldn't tell how long this situation would last.
1000690762.korean: - 하지만 이 상황이 얼마나 지속될 지 알 수 없었다.

1000690763.english: - We had to expand our gains as much as possible while we were superior.
1000690763.korean: - 우리가 우세한 상황에 최대한 전과를 확대해야 했다.

1000690764.english: - Orca's forces began to push the Delta army back.
1000690764.korean: - 오르카 군은 델타 군을 밀어붙이기 시작했다.

1000690767.english: How dare you—bitch—trying to harm my Chairman…

1000690769.english: I don’t hold much hatred toward the Chairman.
1000690769.korean: 나는 회장님에 대한 원한은 별로 없어.

1000690770.english: He wasn’t much of a human, but he treated our sisters well.
1000690770.korean: 인간성은 별로였지만 그래도 우리 자매들에게는 잘해주셨으니까.

1000690771.english: Even if that treatment was meant to provoke your jealousy.
1000690771.korean: 그게 비록 너의 질투심을 유발하기 위한 대우였더라도 말이야.

1000690773.english: Because I wanted to see you in pain.
1000690773.korean: 네가 고통스러워 하는 모습을 보고 싶으니까.

1000690774.english: Just as you wanted to see our sisters suffer.
1000690774.korean: 네가 우리 자매들이 고통스러워 하는 것을 보고 싶었던 것처럼.

1000690776.english: I think you’re mistaken about something right now…
1000690776.korean: 지금 뭔가 착각하고 있는 거 같은데…

1000690777.english: I’m the one in control here.
1000690777.korean: 지금 주도권을 잡고 있는 건 나야.

1000690778.english: I don’t like your attitude at the moment.
1000690778.korean: 지금 네 태도가 마음에 안 드는데.

1000690783.english: The Chairman… has done nothing wrong!

1000690784.english: If I’ve done something wrong… I’ll apologize for everything… I’ll apologize, please!
1000690784.korean: 제가 잘못한 게 있으면… 전부 사과… 사과 드릴 테니까.

1000690787.english: Yeah. Come to think of it, this Chariman isn’t at fault.

1000690788.english: You can use that panel over there to dismantle it.
1000690788.korean: 저기 있는 패널로 해체할 수 있어.

1000690790.english: - In that moment, her anger toward Wristcut had vanished.
1000690790.korean: - 그런 그녀에게 리스트컷에 대한 분노는 사라져있었다.

1000690791.english: - No, it hadn’t vanished—she was just too focused on what needed to be done right now.
1000690791.korean: - 아니, 사라지지는 않았다. 지금 당장 해야하는 일에 정신이 팔려 있을 뿐.

1000690792.english: - Once this is over, she’ll personally punish the traitor who dared put the Chairman in danger.
1000690792.korean: - 이 순간이 지나면 뒤늦게 감히 회장님을 위험에 빠트린 배신자를 손수 벌할 것이다.

1000690794.english: Do you want to stop the operation? Yes / No

1000690795.english: Do you want to stop the operation? [Yes] / No

1000690800.english: How dare you try to harm the Chairman?!

1000690801.english: You’ve forgotten the Chairman’s kindness, and the favor I did by saving you!?
1000690801.korean: 회장님의 은혜도 잊고, 내가 살려준 은혜도 잊고!?

1000690802.english: I’ll rip you apart myself and kill you!

1000690805.english: - Wristcut took Delta’s fury head-on, but instead of being scared she only laughed.
1000690805.korean: - 델타의 분노를 정면으로 받았지만 리스트컷은 겁을 먹기는커녕 웃기만 했다.

1000690806.english: - Delta felt bewilderment amid her anger at that attitude.
1000690806.korean: - 그 태도에 델타는 분노하는 와중에 의아함을 느꼈다.

1000690807.english: - And before long, that bewilderment turned into a chill.
1000690807.korean: - 그리고 오래지 않아 의아함은 섬뜩함이 되었다.

1000690808.english: What on earth is so funny?

1000690809.english: The Chairman you adore so much…

1000690810.english: He's going to die because of you.

1000690812.english: - Wristcut pointed to the panel Delta had just operated.
1000690812.korean: - 리스트컷은 델타가 방금 전에 조작했던 패널을 가리켰다.

1000690815.english: What? Why is the stopped bomb operating?
1000690815.korean: 뭐야? 왜 멈춘 폭탄이 작동하는 거야?

1000690817.english: I just stopped it a moment ago!

1000690819.english: But actually I made it so it would activate when you tampered with it.
1000690819.korean: 하지만 사실은 네가 조작하면 작동하게 만들었어.

1000690821.english: I wanted you to feel... what it’s like to kill someone precious with your own hands
1000690821.korean: 너한테도… 자기 손으로 소중한 사람을 죽일 때의 기분을 느끼게 해주고 싶어서.

1000690822.english: It's a shame that time will only last a few seconds though…
1000690822.korean: 그 시간이 몇 초밖에 안 되는 게 아쉽기는 하지만…

1000690825.english: How… how do I stop it? Please! Stop! I beg you!
1000690825.korean: 어떻게. 어떻게 멈춰? 제발! 멈춰줘! 부탁할게!

1000690835.english: I'm sorry… I just wanted—no matter what—to let you walk the world again, Chairman…
1000690835.korean: 죄송해요. 어떻게든 회장님께서 다시 세상을 누빌 수 있게 해드리려고 했는데…

1000690836.english: I wanted to show you a world that was yours… a world where everything belonged to you…
1000690836.korean: 세상을 회장님께… 모든 것이 회장님의 소유물인 세상을 보여드리려고 했는데…

1000690837.english: I wanted to give you something those useless women could never offer you…
1000690837.korean: 쓸모 없는 년들 따위는 결코 할 수 없는 일을 회장님께 해드리려고 했는데…

1000690838.english: I wanted you to know… that only I—only I—truly serve you…
1000690838.korean: 오직… 오직 저만이 회장님을 위한다는 것을 알려드리고 싶었는데…

1000690839.english: And yet, I couldn't even protect you properly…
1000690839.korean: 지켜드리는 것 마저도 제대로 해드리지 못하다니…

1000690841.english: But… I'll give you what the others never could.
1000690841.korean: 하지만… 다른 년들은 하지 못한 것은 해드릴게요.

1000690842.english: Wherever you go, I'll follow you to the very end.

1000690851.english: (The bandage is about to snap! Grab something else, now!)
1000690851.korean: (붕대가 끊어지려고 하잖아! 빨리 다른 거 붙잡아.)

1000690855.english: Ah, no. It's just a hallucination.

1000690856.english: (Hallucination or not, the fact your life is hanging by a thread is real! Do something!)
1000690856.korean: (환각이든 아니든 언니 생명이 아슬아슬한 건 현실이야! 어서!)

1000690857.english: If you're ghosts, shouldn't you be telling me to die with you?
1000690857.korean: 망령이면 망령답게 같이 죽자고 해야하는 거 아냐?

1000690858.english: (What are you saying? Do you really think you would ever tell us to just die with you in a situation like this?)
1000690858.korean: (무슨 소리야? 언니라면 이런 상황에서 같이 죽으라고 말할 수 있어?)

1000690860.english: I killed you all with my own hands.

1000690861.english: (It's always been our way to think of the bigger picture, no matter what.)
1000690861.korean: (어떤 상황에서도 경제적인 것을 고려하는 게 우리잖아.)

1000690862.english: (It's better for one to die than for two to die.)
1000690862.korean: (둘이 죽는 것보다 하나가 죽는 게 더 나아.)

1000690864.english: One by one, it piled up into tens, into hundreds!

1000690865.english: How could I live like this? How could I be allowed to live?
1000690865.korean: 이런 내가 살 수 있어? 살아도 돼?

1000690867.english: (Just because a thousand died doesn't mean it's fine if the thousand-and-first does too!)
1000690867.korean: (1000 명이 죽었다고, 1001명이 죽어도 되는 건 아냐!)

1000690869.english: I'm sorry… I'm sorry… I'm sorry…

1000690870.english: I should have protected you. No matter what… I should have protected you.
1000690870.korean: 언니가 지켜줬어야 했는데. 어떤 일이 있어도… 지켜줬어야 했는데…

1000690871.english: Even if it meant dying with you… I should have protected you…

1000690872.english: (If it weren't for you, even more would have died. Not just us, but the others too.)
1000690872.korean: (언니가 아니었으면 더 많이 죽었어. 우리뿐만 아니라 다른 애들도.)

1000690873.english: (If it weren't for you, we would've died in far more pain.)

1000690874.english: So you're telling me to live?

1000690875.english: How could I live? How am I supposed to live?
1000690875.korean: 내가 어떻게 살 수 있는데? 내가 어떻게 살아야 하는데?

1000690877.english: In this hell I created by killing you myself—how could I live?
1000690877.korean: 너희를 죽이고 나 스스로 만든 이 지옥에서 어떻게 살라고!

1000690878.english: (That's exactly why you must live! You swore it yourself, remember?)

1000690879.english: (You said you'd drag Delta into hell and follow her there!)

1000690880.english: (You said being alive was hell itself! Then live! Live, even if it's hell—please!)
1000690880.korean: (살아있는 게 지옥 같다며! 그러면 살아! 그래도 살아 제발!)

1000690881.english: Twisted logic! Just hallucinations! Excuses for myself!

1000690883.english: A dead person… shouldn't be telling the living what to do…
1000690883.korean: 죽은 사람이… 산 사람에게 뭐라고 하지마…

1000690885.english: (It's wrong for the dead to lecture the living.)
1000690885.korean: (죽은 사람이 산 사람에게 뭐라고 하는 건 문제가 있지.)

1000690890.english: No time for greetings—start the rescue!

1000690894.english: I just thought about what I'd do if I were you!
1000690894.korean: 내가 언니라면 어떻게 할 지 예상했지!

1000690895.english: All tied off! Audrey, that side?

1000690900.english: Quick! The bandages are about to snap!

1000690902.english: After all this time, killing my sisters just to stay alive?

1000690904.english: You only made the best choice you could in your situation!
1000690904.korean: 언니는 언니의 상황에서 최선의 선택을 했을 뿐이잖아!

1000690905.english: You were just unlucky enough to end up in that position!
1000690905.korean: 언니는 운이 나빠서 그런 상황에 처했을 뿐이잖아!

1000690906.english: Any Taylor, in the same situation, would've done the exact same thing!
1000690906.korean: 어떠한 테일러라도 언니랑 같은 상황이었으면 같은 일을 했을 거야!

1000690907.english: Do you think you don't deserve to live?

1000690908.english: If you were in our place, what would you do?

1000690909.english: If it were your place, and a sister was trying to die—what would you do?"
1000690909.korean: 언니의 입장이었던, 죽으려고 하는 자매가 있으면 어쩔건데?

1000690911.english: Our actions right now—that's our answer!

1000690913.english: (Take my hand, Sister. None of us resent you.)
1000690913.korean: (잡아, 언니. 우리는 아무도 언니를 원망하지 않아.)

1000690914.english: (Just like you wished we wouldn't suffer,)

1000690915.english: (we wish for you to escape your suffering and be happy.)

1000690919.english: By the way… who were you talking to just now?
1000690919.korean: 그런데 방금 전까지 누구랑 이야기하고 있었어?

1000690920.english: Thanks to that, we found you right before you fell.

1000690925.english: The sisters I couldn't protect… who don't resent me… who want me to live…
1000690925.korean: 내가 지키지 못하고… 나를 원망하지 않고… 내가 살기를 바라는…

1000690926.english: who want me to be happy…

1000690928.english: - When Merlin joined the group, she wasn't the only one who joined the Orca.
1000690928.korean: - 멀린이 합류할 때, 멀린 혼자서만 오르카에 합류한 것은 아니었다.

1000690929.english: - First came the mobile munitions factory and transport ship Friedwen, along with the Stronghold Corps.
1000690929.korean: - 가장 먼저 이동군수공장 겸 수송선 프리드웬과 스트롱홀드 군단.

1000690931.english: - That alone greatly boosted Orca's capabilities, but the assets Merlin brought weren't limited to material ones.
1000690931.korean: - 이것만으로도 오르카의 전력은 급격히 증대되었지만 멀린이 가지고 있는 자원은 물질적인 것에만 한정되어 있지 않았다.

1000690932.english: - She also possessed a wealth of intelligence on Black River and PECS that we hadn't yet uncovered.
1000690932.korean: - 우리가 미처 파악하지 못한 블랙리버와 PECS의 여러 정보들.

1000690933.english: - Among that data were pieces of information whose value would never fade with time—unlike those that naturally lose relevance.
1000690933.korean: - 시간이 지나면서 가치가 상실되는 정보 외에도 시간이 흘러도 가치가 상실되지 않는 정보들이 있었다.

1000690934.english: - Chief among them were the locations of the secret laboratories established by Black River and PECS across Europe.
1000690934.korean: - 그 대표적인 것이 블랙리버와 PECS가 유럽에 설립한 비밀 연구소의 위치였다.

1000690935.english: - Some of these overlapped with information provided by Wristcut, but that overlap served as valuable material for cross-verification.
1000690935.korean: - 개중에는 리스트컷이 제공한 정보와 겹치는 것이 있었지만 이는 교차 검증의 자료로 유용하게 쓸 수 있었다.

1000690936.english: - From one of Black River's former laboratories, we obtained several data points—along with traces of a test subject who had fled the facility.
1000690936.korean: - 그리고 블랙리버의 옛 연구소에서는 몇 가지 정보와 연구소를 떠나 방황하는 실험체의 추적 정보를 입수할 수 있었다.

1000690937.english: - According to the remaining records, the subject was a Bioroid capable of controlling AGS wreckage.
1000690937.korean: - 연구소에 남아있는 정보에 따르자면 AGS의 잔해를 조종할 수 있는 능력을 지닌 바이오로이드라고 한다.

1000690938.english: - Following the meeting, we decided to persuade them to join Orca.
1000690938.korean: - 회의 결과 설득해서 오르카에 합류시키자는 결론을 내렸다.

1000690939.english: - The task of persuasion was assigned to Anger of Horde, who was operating as part of an independent detachment in Europe.
1000690939.korean: - 설득은 유럽에서 별동대로 활약을 펼치고 있는 앵거 오브 호드가 하기로 했다.

1000690940.english: - ……There are some potential risks, but with level-headed members on the team, it should be fine.
1000690940.korean: - ……불안 요소가 없지는 않지만 그래도 상식적인 대원들이 있으니까 괜찮을 거다.

1000690942.english: Our objective today is to track down the Black River test subject and invite her to join us.
1000690942.korean: 오늘 우리의 목표는 블랙리버의 실험체 추적 및 합류 권유다.

1000690943.english: What if she doesn't want to join Orca, Captain?
1000690943.korean: 오르카에 합류하기 싫다고 하면 어쩔 거야, 대장?

1000690944.english: What do you think we'd do?

1000690945.english: Kahaha! We'd just let her go her own way and get back to our own business.
1000690945.korean: 캬하핫, 그냥 갈 길 가라고 하고 우리도 할 일하러 가겠지.

1000690947.english: A test subject from Black River, you say?

1000690948.english: Then she must have some kind of special ability, right? What kind of ability is it?
1000690948.korean: 그러면 뭔가 특별한 능력이 있겠네요? 무슨 능력인가요?

1000690949.english: They say she can control AGS wreckage.
1000690949.korean: AGS의 잔해를 조종할 수 있는 능력이라고 한다.

1000690951.english: If it were magnetic control, they'd have said so…

1000690952.english: It means she can make broken AGS parts move again, right?
1000690952.korean: 부서진 AGS잔해를 다시 움직이게 한다는 의미지?

1000690953.english: Oh, like in zombie movies? You mean she can reanimate the remains and control them?
1000690953.korean: 아, 좀비 영화처럼? 시체를 다시 움직여서 조종한다는 말이지?

1000690954.english: She's not evil or cruel, is she? In movies, characters who control corpses are usually creepy, sinister villains.
1000690954.korean: 성격이 사악하고 잔혹하거나 그렇지는 않겠지? 보통 영화에서 시체를 조종하는 캐릭터는 음침하고 사악한 악당이기 마련이잖아.

1000690956.english: What if she turns out to be hostile toward us?

1000690957.english: We'll have to make her behave.

1000690958.korean: 호드가 그것 하나 못 할 리는 없지 않나.

1000690959.english: Kya-ha-ha-ha! Still, we can blow AGS wreckage to pieces, right?
1000690959.korean: 꺄하하하핫! 그래도 AGS 잔해는 마구 펑펑 터트려도 되겠지?

1000690960.english: Only if the target is hostile.

1000690962.english: People who don't know might think I'm constantly setting off bombs.
1000690962.korean: 모르는 사람이 보면 내가 시도때도 없이 폭탄을 터트리는 줄 알겠네.

1000690964.english: Route to the target has been scouted.

1000690965.english: However, there's a risk of encountering a swarm of Metal Parasites en route.
1000690965.korean: 다만 중간에 철충 무리와 마주칠 위험이 있어요.

1000690966.english: What should we do, should we scout a detour? Or...?
1000690966.korean: 어떻게 할까요, 우회로를 다시 탐색할까요? 아니면?

1000690967.english: We'll do it in the most Horde-like way.

1000690968.english: Force a breakthrough. They'll fight us sooner or later anyway; it's good to thin their numbers beforehand.
1000690968.korean: 강행돌파다. 어차피 나중에 우리와 싸우게 될 텐데 미리 숫자를 줄이는 것도 좋겠지.

1000690969.english: That's why I like the Captain.

1000690970.english: Boom boom boom! Time to show the whole Shin Niagara Party Combo up front.
1000690970.korean: 쾅쾅쾅! 신 나이아가라 파티 콤보를 모두 앞에서 선보일 때가 되었네.

1000690971.english: Wait a moment, Ms. Hyena. Hand me that bomb.
1000690971.korean: 잠깐만요, 하이에나 씨. 그 폭탄 줘보세요.

1000690974.english: Hey, Private Keshik. Even among comrades, there are lines that shouldn't be crossed.
1000690974.korean: 이봐, 케시크 일병. 아무리 같은 부대원이라도 지켜야 할 선은 있는 법이야.

1000690975.english: You had me in charge of grenade resupply and maintenance until just yesterday—so why won't you give it now?
1000690975.korean: 바로 어제까지 수류탄 보급 및 정비 저한테 맡겼으면서 지금은 못 주는 이유가 뭐죠?

1000690976.english: After spending a night together, I've grown attached...

1000690982.english: I told you before, at the very least, use standard detonators!
1000690982.korean: 제가 다른 건 몰라도 뇌관은 정규제품 쓰시라고 말씀 드렸죠?

1000690983.english: This isn't the first time—you keep using those overly sensitive modified ones!
1000690983.korean: 한두 번도 아니고 계속 민감하게 개조한 뇌관 쓰시면 어떡해요!

1000690984.english: It's fine, it's fine. Nothing's gone wrong so far.
1000690984.korean: 괜찮아. 괜찮아. 지금까지 아무런 문제 없었잖아.

1000690985.english: That kind of thinking is exactly what leads to accidents!

1000690986.english: Pffft! "That kind of thinking leads to an accident," huh… nice wordplay.

1000690989.english: Oh, my lady! If you take that too, how's this poor girl supposed to use her Shin Niagara Party Combo?!
1000690989.korean: 아이고 마님! 그것까지 가지고가시면 소녀는 어떻게 신 나이아가라 파티 콤보를 쓰란 말씀이십니까요!

1000690990.english: You still have standard ones left!

1000690991.english: Just use those, and don't go causing trouble!
1000690991.korean: 괜히 사고 일으키지 말고 그거 쓰세요!

1000690992.english: Hey, quartermaster. Can't you secretly modify these for me?
1000690992.korean: 이봐, 보급관님. 나를 위해 몰래 이것들 개조해줄 수 없어?

1000690993.english: Don't you want to see the Shin Niagara Party Combo in action?
1000690993.korean: 신 나이아가라 파티 콤보 보고 싶지 않아?

1000690995.english: Kheshig would definitely give me an earful later… so no thanks.
1000690995.korean: 나중에 케시크가 달달 볶을 게 분명하니까… 안 할 거야.

1000690997.english: Even though Hyena got demoted and they're the same rank now, she doesn't back down at all.
1000690997.korean: 하이에나가 계급 강등 당해서 동계급이 되었다고 하더라도 조금도 지질 않네.

1000690998.english: She used to be so timid she couldn't even speak properly when she couldn't keep up with us… but now, seeing Hyena completely helpless before her, it really hits me.
1000690998.korean: 처음에는 우리를 따라오지 못해서 기가 죽어 말도 제대로 못했는데… 지금은 하이에나가 꼼짝을 못 하는 것을 보면 감회가 새로워.

1000690999.english: As expected of Captain Khan's origin!

1000691000.english: Captain, were you like that when you were Kheshig?

1000691002.english: I can see a swarm of Metal Parasites.

1000691004.english: Hey, Arthur! A new bioroid has arrived?

1000691005.english: It's thanks to the intel I provided, so I want a cut too...
1000691005.korean: 내가 제공한 정보 덕분이니 나한테도 콩고물이…

1000691008.english: Even the newbie's showing more skin than me now!

1000691009.english: Fine—if it's come to this, I'll change my strategy too!
1000691009.korean: 이렇게 된 이상 나도 전략을 바꾼다!

1000691010.english: Offense and defense, all at once! I'll strip, and dress the rest—
1000691010.korean: 공방을 한 번에! 나는 벗고 남은 입힌……

1000691012.english: You're the one who shook up all my beers, aren't you?!
1000691012.korean: 제 맥주 전부 흔들어 놓은 거 당신이죠!

1000691013.english: Honestly, are you only going to come to your senses when one of you dies?!
1000691013.korean: 당신 진짜 둘 중에 하나가 죽어야 정신을 차릴 건가요!

1000691015.english: Arthur, I was never here today.
1000691015.korean: 아서, 나는 오늘 여기 안 온거야.

1000691018.english: Ah, no—I mean, H… Hela. Not "Hela," just… Hela…
1000691018.korean: 아, 아뇨. 헤… 헬라가. 아니라… 헬라…

1000691019.english: - Even though I told her to relax, Hela still treated me with a stiff attitude.
1000691019.korean: - 내가 긴장을 풀라고 말했지만 헬라는 여전히 뻣뻣한 태도로 나를 대했다.

1000691021.english: I'm sorry, my ability's nothing special.

1000691022.english: - Hela's self-esteem wasn't just on the floor—it was about to sink through it.
1000691022.korean: - 헬라는 자존감이 바닥을 기어다니다 못해 바닥을 뚫을 지경이었다.

1000691023.english: - Looking at Hela, I thought of Neodym.

1000691024.english: - Black River transformed Neodym into a kind-hearted girl who, despite possessing immense power, would rather suffer herself than harm others.
1000691024.korean: - 블랙리버는 네오딤을 강대한 능력을 가지고 있지만 남을 해치기보다는 자신이 아픈 것을 택하는 착한 소녀로 만들었다.

1000691025.english: - Similarly, I can't help but suspect that Hela was also designed to be a character who, despite possessing immense power, lacks self-confidence.
1000691025.korean: - 그것과 마찬가지로 헬라도 막대한 능력을 가지고 있으면서 자신감을 가지지 못하는 성격으로 만든게 아닌가 하는 의심이 든다.

1000691026.english: - Still, whatever the reason, Hela was clearly tired and tense.
1000691026.korean: - 하지만 원인은 어찌되었건 지금 헬라는 많이 피곤하고 긴장한 상태였다.

1000691027.english: - Let's take a break for now and get to know each other a little better.
1000691027.korean: - 당분간은 쉬게 해주면서 좀 더 서로를 알아가보도록 하자.

1000691029.english: I knew you'd stop asking why I don't cover up down there anymore!
1000691029.korean: 이제는 왜 아래 쪽은 안 가리는지 안 물어볼 줄 알았다!

1000691030.english: So that's where you were, Merlin!

1000691031.english: You'd better be ready for me to shake your head as much as you shook my beer!
1000691031.korean: 맥주 흔들어 놓은 만큼 머리통을 흔들어버릴 줄 아세요!

1000691034.english: - While the landing was in full swing, we formed a detachment and sent them out on a new mission.
1000691034.korean: - 상륙이 한창 진행되고 있을 때, 우리는 별동대를 구성해서 새로운 목표로 출동시켰다.

1000691035.english: - The objective was a brainwashing center that controls devices used to indoctrinate Bioroids.
1000691035.korean: - 목표는 바이오로이드들을 세뇌시키는 장치를 제어하는 세뇌 센터.

1000691036.english: - The team consisted of Alfred, who would hack the brainwashing center; the Strikers, who would breach the center's defenses and protect Alfred; and the Bermuda team.
1000691036.korean: - 구성원은 세뇌 센터를 해킹할 알프레드와 세뇌 센터의 수비를 뚫고, 알프레드를 지킬 스트라이커즈 그리고 버뮤다 팀.

1000691039.english: You okay? Feeling sick? Want a candy?
1000691039.korean: 괜찮아? 속 안 좋아? 사탕 먹을래?

1000691041.english: Don't be nervous. You've got the others with you. They'll protect you.
1000691041.korean: 긴장하지마. 다른 애들이 있잖아. 다른 애들이 헬라를 지켜줄 거야.

1000691042.english: B-but someone as useless as me…
1000691042.korean: 하, 하지만 저처럼 쓸모 없는 애…

1000691045.english: Hello, Hela. I'm X-00 Tiamat of the Strikers.
1000691045.korean: 안녕하세요, 헬라. 저는 스트라이커즈의 X-00 티아멧이라고 해요.

1000691050.english: Sorry. Before I was implanted with common knowledge, the lab I was in got destroyed...
1000691050.korean: 죄송해요. 상식을 주입 받기 전에 제가 있던 연구소가 파괴되어서…

1000691051.english: Ah, no. I was the one being self-conscious.

1000691052.english: As you can tell from the model number X-00, I was also a prototype operated by Black River.
1000691052.korean: X-00라는 형식 번호에서 알 수 있듯이 저도 블랙리버 사에서 실험기로 운용되었어요.

1000691053.english: But due to a few flaws, like cost-to-performance ratio, I was never mass-produced and went through countless tests.
1000691053.korean: 하지만 비용대비 효율 같은 몇가지 결점이 있어서 양산은 못 되고 수없이 테스트를 받았죠.

1000691054.english: ……Each time, the researchers called me useless.
1000691054.korean: ……그럴 때마다 저는 연구원들에게 쓸모없다는 말을 들었죠.

1000691056.english: I started to believe that too—that I was useless.

1000691057.english: So when I first met the Commander, I said I could do everything by myself.
1000691057.korean: 그래서 사령관과 처음 만났을 때, 저 혼자 모든 것을 할 수 있다고 말해버렸죠.

1000691058.english: It might've sounded confident… but really, it was a plea not to be seen as worthless.
1000691058.korean: 자신감 넘치게 들리지만… 실제로는 저를 쓸모 없다고 여기지 말아달라는 간청이었어요.

1000691059.english: I pushed myself to the limit because of that—and nearly got myself killed.
1000691059.korean: 그래서 제 한계까지 무리를 했고 위험에 빠질 뻔했죠.

1000691060.english: That was the price of not being able to see my abilities objectively.
1000691060.korean: 자신의 능력을 객관화 시키지 못한 대가였어요.

1000691061.english: But now I understand. I'm not useless.
1000691061.korean: 하지만 이제는 알아요. 제가 쓸모 없지 않다는 것을.

1000691062.english: I can't do everything—but there are things I can do with confidence.
1000691062.korean: 모든 걸 할 수 있지는 않지만 제가 자신 있게 할 수 있는 게 있다는 것을 알아요.

1000691064.english: What I lack, my teammates make up for.
1000691064.korean: 저의 부족한 점은 동료들이 보충해준다는 것을.

1000691065.english: And what they lack, I can make up for.
1000691065.korean: 그리고 동료들의 부족한 점도 제가 보충할 수 있다는 것도 알아요.

1000691066.english: Hela. Even if you still think you're useless, please remember—your teammates don't think so.
1000691066.korean: 헬라 씨. 아직 자신을 쓸모 없다고 여기셔도 동료들은 헬라 씨를 쓸모없다고 여기지 않는다는 것을 알아주세요.

1000691067.english: But… you haven't seen what I can do yet.
1000691067.korean: 하지만… 제 능력을 아직 못 보셨잖아요.

1000691069.english: But even if it's not today, I believe you'll have your chance to show what you can really do, Hela.
1000691069.korean: 하지만 꼭 오늘은 아니더라도 헬라 씨가 자신의 능력을 마음껏 펼쳐 보일 거라는 것을 믿어요.

1000691070.english: Yeah. I couldn't use my abilities properly at first either.
1000691070.korean: 응. 나도 처음에는 제대로 능력을 못 썼어.

1000691071.english: But after practicing for a while, I got better at it.

1000691072.english: You can do that too, Hela.

1000691075.english: Sniff sniff! I'm moved to tears by the overflowing sisterly affection of these young ladies!
1000691075.korean: 흑흑! 소녀들의 넘치는 우애에 감격의 눈물이 흐르는군요.

1000691076.english: Of course, I don't actually have tear ducts!

1000691077.english: Now then, girls, girls! We've arrived at the operation zone!
1000691077.korean: 자! 소녀소녀 여러분! 작전 구역에 도달했습니다요!

1000691078.english: It seems the enemies still haven't noticed our presence!
1000691078.korean: 아직 적들은 우리들의 존재를 깨닫지 못한 거 같군요!

1000691080.english: Let's rescue the brainwashed Bioroids quickly and make it back just as fast!
1000691080.korean: 후딱 세뇌 된 바이오로이드 분들을 구하고 후딱 돌아가도록 하지요!

1000691081.english: - The raid on the brainwashing center was successful.

1000691082.english: - The detachment that stormed the brainwashing center reached the main computer in no time.
1000691082.korean: - 세뇌 센터에 돌입한 별동대는 메인 컴퓨터까지 순식간에 돌입했다.

1000691084.english: This is going to take longer than expected!

1000691085.english: The rescue is markedly different from Guam.

1000691089.english: This isn't the time for joking!

1000691091.english: When Ullr stops joking, that's how you know it's serious…
1000691091.korean: 우르가 농담을 안 하면 그만큼 심각하다는 건데..

1000691092.english: Are the Bermuda members all right?

1000691094.english: But the main computer's interference means we can't properly use magnetic or bioelectric abilities!
1000691094.korean: 하지만 메인 컴퓨터에 영향이 가서 본격적으로 자기력이나 생체 전기 능력은 못 써요!

1000691095.english: The Commander said if we can't finish the hack, we should destroy the computer…
1000691095.korean: 사령관은 해킹을 완료하지 못할 거 같으면 컴퓨터를 망가트리라고 했는데…

1000691096.english: Oh no, if we do that, we don't know what'll happen to the brainwashed ones.
1000691096.korean: 아이고, 그랬다가는 세뇌당한 분들이 어떻게 될 지 모릅니다.

1000691097.english: Just a little! Please hold on just a little longer!

1000691098.english: I, Alfred, will complete this hack even if it costs me my life!
1000691098.korean: 이 알프레드, 이 한 목숨 바쳐서라도 해킹을 성공하겠습니다!

1000691099.english: Though, of course, I don't actually have a life…

1000691101.english: I'll succeed—for the sake of everyone who believes in me!
1000691101.korean: 저를 믿어주시는 모든 분들을 위해서라도 성공하겠습니다!

1000691105.english: A—please prioritize taking out the AGS.

1000691106.english: I—I'll use my ability to control the broken AGS.
1000691106.korean: 제, 제 능력으로 부서진 AGS를 조종할게요.

1000691110.english: Let's prioritize AGS to defeat the enemy!

1000691114.english: Wow! The broken parts are moving again. What kind of principle is this?
1000691114.korean: 우와! 부서진 게 다시 움직이잖아. 이게 무슨 원리야?

1000691116.english: Ullr, focus on taking out the enemy AGS!

1000691117.english: That AGS is marked "to be removed," so nobody touch it.

1000691119.english: Ullr's got some breathing room now.

1000691120.english: Mr. Alfred? How's the hacking coming along?

1000691121.english: Oh dear, there's still a long way to go.

1000691126.english: Nice! The Bioroids have come to their senses!

1000691127.english: This is Strikers! The first brainwashing center has been hacked!
1000691127.korean: 여기는 스트라이커즈! 첫 번째 세뇌센터는 해킹 완료!

1000691128.english: We're heading to the next hacking center!

1000691135.english: We're breaking through in a straight line from here!

1000691137.english: Could it really be Commander Nashorn?

1000691139.english: Well… judging by the sound and intensity of the bombardment, the odds are highest that it's Commander Nashorn…
1000691139.korean: 글쎄… 포격음으로 보나, 화력으로 보나 나스호른 대장일 가능성이 제일 크기는 한데…

1000691140.english: But knowing her personality, I can't really see her taking the initiative to be on the front line.
1000691140.korean: 나스호른 대장 성격에 적극적으로 전장에 나설까 싶기도 하고.

1000691141.english: C-Could she be acting under threat?
1000691141.korean: 서, 설마 협박을 받고 있는 거 아닐까요?

1000691142.english: If Commander Nashorn were the type to act under pressure, she would've done something back when Captain Bloody Panther said she'd quit if Nashorn didn't get her work done.
1000691142.korean: 나스호른 대장이 외압에 움직일 성격이면 옛날에 블러디 팬서 대장이 일 안하면 때려치우겠다고 했을 때에 움직였겠지.

1000691143.english: In the end, it was Captain Bloody Panther who gave up.

1000691145.english: Maybe it's true, what the intel says—that she's been brainwashed by a control device?
1000691145.korean: 지금 정보가 들어온 것처럼 세뇌 장치에 세뇌 당하고 있는 거 아닐까?

1000691147.english: No matter how lazy Commander Nashorn is, she still knows right from wrong.
1000691147.korean: 나스호른 대장이 아무리 게을러도 옳고 그른 것은 구분할 줄 알잖아요.

1000691148.english: Maybe it's because she knows right from wrong that she slacked off that much?
1000691148.korean: 옳고 그른 것을 구분할 줄 알아서 그렇게 농땡이를 부렸나?

1000691149.english: Anyway, if she's hostile because of a brainwashing device, that's going to be a headache.
1000691149.korean: 어쨌든 세뇌 장치 때문에 우리를 적대하는 거면 골치 아픈데.

1000691150.english: It means we can't do anything until the strike team takes out the brainwashing center.
1000691150.korean: 별동대가 세뇌 센터를 처리할 때까지 어떻게 못한다는 의미잖아.

1000691151.english: It's not just because she's a former commander, but… I really don't want to fight Commander Nashorn.
1000691151.korean: 전 대장이라서가 아니라 나스호른 대장이랑 싸우는 건 싫은데…

1000691152.english: If you get hit by Nageling, you won't even have bones left to pick up.

1000691154.english: Since when were we cowards who got scared of the enemy's attacks?
1000691154.korean: 우리가 언제 적의 공격에 겁먹는 겁쟁이였냐?

1000691156.english: We're the unit that holds the line and smashes the enemy at the same time!
1000691156.korean: 우리는 적의 공격을 버티면서 적을 박살 내는 부대다!

1000691157.english: That doesn't change, even if the opponent is Commander Nashorn!
1000691157.korean: 이건 상대가 나스호른 대장이라도 변하지 않아!

1000691159.english: We advance while destroying everything in our path!

1000691165.english: Why are you working with Delta?!
1000691165.korean: 왜 하필 델타와 손을 잡고 계십니까!

1000691166.english: Hold on. Don’t just say what you want to say.
1000691166.korean: 잠깐만. 너 하고 싶은 말만 하지 말고.

1000691168.english: What are you talking about? Omega?

1000691169.english: Delta said they were fighting Omega.
1000691169.korean: 델타가 오메가랑 싸우고 있는 중이라고 했는데?

1000691170.english: We’re fighting as part of the army of the Last Human!
1000691170.korean: 저희 마지막 인간님의 군대에서 싸우고 있는 중입니다!

1000691171.english: The Last Human? There’s still a human alive?

1000691172.english: Not one of those resurrected by Omega or Delta—an actual, living human!
1000691172.korean: 오메가나 델타가 부활시키려는 인간이 아니라 제대로 살아 있는 인간?

1000691174.english: So please, come back to us!

1000691178.english: Proof that you’re really fighting for the humans.
1000691178.korean: 너네가 인간 측에서 싸우고 있다는 증거.

1000691180.english: Delta told me they’re fighting Omega, and you’re telling me you’re with the humans!
1000691180.korean: 델타는 나한테 오메가랑 싸우고 있다고 말하고, 너는 너희가 인간 측에 소속 되어있다고 말하고 있잖냐!

1000691181.english: Those stories don’t match—so who am I supposed to believe?

1000691182.english: Dammit! You’ve known us for how long now?!

1000691183.english: By that logic, I’ve been eating Delta’s rations for quite a while too.
1000691183.korean: 그렇게 따지면 나도 좀 오랫동안 델타한테 밥 얻어먹었다?

1000691184.english: What proof do I have that you’re not lying to me?

1000691186.english: Oh, Io. Long time no see.

1000691188.english: It’s true—we’re fighting under the Last Human.
1000691188.korean: 저희들 마지막 인간님 밑에서 싸우고 있는 거 사실이에요.

1000691189.english: A-and that person’s really a good one.
1000691189.korean: 그, 그리고 그 분 좋은 분이세요.

1000691190.english: Mm. Whether they’re good or not, the real question is—do they actually exist?
1000691190.korean: 응. 좋은 사람이든 아니든 그 사람이 실제로 있는지가 중요하지?

1000691191.english: Ah, damn it! The jamming’s killing our comms!
1000691191.korean: 아! 제길! 방해전파 때문에 통신이 안 되잖아!

1000691195.english: No matter how well Delta treats you, it’s still nothing compared to how you’re treated in ORCA!
1000691195.korean: 델타한테 아무리 대우를 잘 받아도 우리 오르카에서 대우 받는 것보다는 못할 걸?

1000691196.english: You get food, you get clothes, you get paid.
1000691196.korean: 밥 나오지, 옷 나오지, 월급 나오지.

1000691198.english: Well, that’s just how it is for soldiers...

1000691204.english: Yeah. I get that the "last human" you’re talking about is a man.
1000691204.korean: 응. 너희가 말하는 마지막 인간님이 남자라는 것은 알겠어.

1000691205.english: If such a person really exists, that is.

1000691212.english: Are you sure it’s appropriate to dress like that on the battlefield?
1000691212.korean: 전장에서 그렇게 입고 돌아다니는 것이 맞나 싶다.

1000691213.english: I’m wearing this for the broadcast!
1000691213.korean: 중계를 위해서 입고 있는 거 거든!

1000691214.english: Didn’t you see the propaganda show I worked so hard on?
1000691214.korean: 선전전 방송 열심히 보냈는데 못 봤어?

1000691221.english: I’m a brigadier general candidate, sir!

1000691222.english: And I’m already serving as the commander of Armored Maiden, sir!
1000691222.korean: 그리고 아머드 메이든 대장으로 이미 복무하고 있지 말입니다.

1000691223.english: Even if you defect, I’ll handle all the duties, so just shut up and come with us!
1000691223.korean: 대장이 전향하셔도 제가 업무 다 할 테니까 닥치고 전향하십쇼!

1000691225.english: Hey, you Delta lackey! Tell Delta this for me—

1000691231.english: Bloody Panther… looks like we’ve been duped, huh?
1000691231.korean: 블러디 팬서 대장… 속은 거 같죠?

1000691233.english: But I guess we’ll have to change how we address her from now on.

1000691234.english: Anyway, the mission’s complete, and Commander Nashorn’s defected. So I’d say all’s well that ends well.
1000691234.korean: 어쨌건 간에 임무는 무사히 완수하고 나스호른 대장도 전향했으니 만사 OK겠지.

1000691235.english: Now then—Orca yearns! Orca at twelve o’clock!
1000691235.korean: 자, 오르카는 갈망한다! 열두 시 내 오르카!

1000691236.english: The Armored Maiden detachment has successfully persuaded their former commander, Nashorn, to join us!
1000691236.korean: 아머드 메이든 별동대는 이렇게 원 대장인 나스호른 대장을 설득하는 데 성공했습니다!

1000691237.english: The goddess of victory smiles upon Orca today!
1000691237.korean: 승리의 여신은 오르카를 향해 미소 짓는데요.

1000691239.english: You think we’re talking about you, Commander?

1000691240.english: If the goddess of victory were this lazy, there wouldn’t be a single war dividing the world, sir.
1000691240.korean: 승리의 여신이 이렇게 게으름뱅이라면 전 세계에 승패가 나눠지는 전쟁은 하나도 안 생기겠지 말입니다.

1000691241.english: Wouldn’t that be a good thing?

1000691242.english: Then people wouldn’t even want to fight in the first place.
1000691242.korean: 그러면 모두가 처음부터 안 싸우려고 하겠지.

1000691243.english: It’s better to avoid battles altogether than to win or lose them.
1000691243.korean: 승패가 나눠지는 것보다 처음부터 안 싸우는 게 최고잖냐.

1000691246.english: Are you even trying to find them?
1000691246.korean: 당신 정말로 찾을 생각은 있는 건가요?

1000691248.english: You oversee most of PECS's satellites, and yet you can't locate a group of that size?
1000691248.korean: PECS의 위성 대부분을 관할하는 당신이 작지 않은 규모의 집단을 못 찾는다고요?

1000691249.english: Your incompetence is honestly beyond words.

1000691250.english: Hand over all your authority to me!

1000691251.english: Hah! Bold of you to say that, when you led an elite squad and still failed to capture a single human—losing Kestos Himas on top of it?
1000691251.korean: 핫! 그렇게 말하는 너도 정예 병력을 데리고 가서도 인간을 잡기는커녕 케스토스 히마스까지 잃고 왔으면서?

1000691252.english: What now, planning to lose the satellites too?

1000691253.english: Delta, may I make a suggestion?

1000691254.english: You seem to have trouble knowing when to keep out of things—so could you just shut up?
1000691254.korean: 낄 곳 안 낄 곳 구분 못하는 거 같은데 그냥 닥치고 있어 주시겠어요?

1000691255.english: Don't tell me you also butted in when Moon River's chairman was having his "good times" with the Designers?
1000691255.korean: 설마 문리버 회장이 디자이너들과 좋은 시간 보낼 때도 끼어들고 그랬나요?

1000691258.english: Omega. Don't you have anything to say to me?

1000691260.english: Aren't you going to threaten me to hand over Poseidon's entire fleet?
1000691260.korean: 포세이돈의 함대를 전부 내놓으라고 협박 안 해?

1000691263.english: You want my fleet, my territory?

1000691264.english: Try and take it by force!

1000691267.english: I just don't see the need.

1000691268.english: Hm… I was trying to lighten the mood with a joke, but I guess it didn't help much.
1000691268.korean: 흠… 기운 차리라고 농담 좀 했는데 딱히 도움은 안 됐나 보네.

1000691273.english: Are you hiding a human right now?

1000691274.english: Huh? What are you talking about?

1000691276.english: If a human were cooperating with one of us Lemonades, who would be the most likely?
1000691276.korean: 만약에 인간이 우리 레모네이드들 중에 하나와 협력을 하고 있으면 누가 가능성이 높을까요?

1000691277.english: Alpha's already betrayed us and gone to serve under that human.
1000691277.korean: 알파는 이미 배신해서 인간의 밑에 들어갔어요.

1000691278.english: And you, Beta, are part of the faction opposing the Chairman's resurrection, just like Alpha.
1000691278.korean: 그리고 베타 당신은 알파와 마찬가지로 회장 부활 반대파죠.

1000691279.english: So it wouldn't be strange if Alpha contacted you first and asked you to hide the human.
1000691279.korean: 알파가 당신에게 먼저 접촉해서 인간을 숨겨달라고 말을 해도 이상할 것이 없어요.

1000691280.english: Even if you didn't act directly, I believe you'd at least cooperate to some extent.
1000691280.korean: 당신이 적극적으로 움직이진 않더라도 협력 정도는 충분히 할 거라고 생각해요.

1000691282.english: Alpha never contacted me at all!
1000691282.korean: 알파는 저한테 아무런 연락도 안 했어요!

1000691283.english: And if Alpha did contact you?

1000691285.english: I-I'd… I'd report it to you, Omega.
1000691285.korean: 여, 연락이 왔다고 오메가에게… 알려 줄게요.

1000691289.english: You're not hiding the human's location, are you?
1000691289.korean: 인간의 위치 숨겨두고 있는 건 아니죠?

1000691290.english: Ha! Why would I? Do you think I'd sit quietly if I knew where the human was?
1000691290.korean: 하! 내가 왜? 인간의 위치를 알면 내가 가만히 있을 거라고 생각해?

1000691292.english: But you wouldn't tell us either.

1000691293.english: You'd try to keep the human all to yourself!

1000691294.english: And if you tried to monopolize the human…

1000691295.english: I wouldn't stand by and let it happen.

1000691296.english: Oh my, you know me that well?

1000691297.english: Then you must also know I'm not the type to fall for such cheap provocation.
1000691297.korean: 그러면 내가 그딴 도발에 안 넘어갈 거라는 것도 알고 있겠네?

1000691301.english: If you're not going to fight, then stop with the pointless arguing.
1000691301.korean: 안 싸울 거면 말싸움만 하는 건 그만두라고.

1000691303.english: I'm starting to feel doubtful about this whole meeting itself.
1000691303.korean: 이제는 이 모임 자체에 회의감이 들려고 하네요.

1000691304.english: Annoyingly enough, I agree with you on that.

1000691307.english: Alright. Let's end the meeting here for today.

1000691309.english: I hope next time we can reach a more productive conclusion.
1000691309.korean: 다음에는 좀 더 생산적인 결론이 나왔으면 좋겠네요.

1000691313.english: Allocate more intel assets to Europe.

1000691314.english: Delta's attitude was different from usual.

1000691315.english: Either Delta was hiding something… or…

1000691316.english: Someone else was pretending to be Delta.
1000691316.korean: 델타가 아닌 다른 누군가가 델타 흉내를 내고 있던가.

1000691317.english: - After finishing the regular council meeting of the Lemonade secretaries, Alpha let out a sigh and said,
1000691317.korean: - 정기적으로 행해지는 레모네이드 비서들의 평의회를 막 끝마친 알파는 한숨을 내쉰 후 말했다.

1000691318.english: I'm not entirely sure... but I think Omega noticed that I was impersonating Delta.
1000691318.korean: 확실하지는 않지만… 오메가가 제가 델타를 흉내 낸 것을 알아차린 것 같아요.

1000691319.english: - To conceal Delta's death, the technicians had altered things so that the Lemonades on the other side of the screen would perceive Alpha as Delta.
1000691319.korean: - 델타가 사망한 것을 숨기기 위해 화면 너머의 레모네이드들이 알파를 델타로 인식할 수 있게 기술진들이 손을 썼다.

1000691320.english: - However, it seems this scheme wasn't perfect either.
1000691320.korean: - 하지만 이 공작도 완벽하지는 않았던 것 같다.

1000691321.english: - After Delta's death, Europe came under our sphere of influence.
1000691321.korean: - 델타가 죽은 이후 유럽은 우리의 영향권에 들어오게 되었다.

1000691322.english: - Our power had grown to an incomparable level — in infrastructure, resources, manpower, and technology — but it wasn't without its side effects.
1000691322.korean: - 인프라, 자원, 인력, 기술 등 지금까지 와는 비교도 안 되게 세력을 불린 우리였지만 부작용이 없는 것은 아니었다.

1000691323.english: - First, a considerable portion of Europe was still under Metal Parasite control. Only a few scattered regions free from their threat could be secured as our own territory.
1000691323.korean: - 첫 번째로 유럽에는 철충의 세력권이 적지 않다는 것. 드문드문 철충의 위협에서 벗어날 수 있는 지역만이 온전히 우리의 구역으로 확보할 수 있었다.

1000691324.english: - We considered expanding into the Metal Parasite zones through our troops, but there was no need to provoke them and open new fronts by agitating those that weren't actively hostile.
1000691324.korean: - 대원들을 통해서 철충의 세력권까지 흡수할지 고민했지만 괜히 긁어서 부스럼이라고 적극적으로 움직이지 않는 철충을 자극해서 전선을 늘릴 필요는 없었다.

1000691325.english: - Orca's forces were still far too weak for a full-scale war against the Metal Parasites.
1000691325.korean: - 아직 철충과 전면전을 하기에는 오르카의 전력이 많이 부족했다.

1000691326.english: - Except for battles essential to securing key positions, we avoided clashes with them as much as possible.
1000691326.korean: - 요충지를 확보하기 위한 필수적인 전투를 제외하고 철충과의 충돌은 최대한 피했다.

1000691327.english: - The second side effect was that our actions were becoming increasingly likely to be discovered by the other Lemonades.
1000691327.korean: - 두 번째 부작용은 다른 레모네이드들에게 우리의 행보가 들킬 위험이 커졌다는 점이다.

1000691328.english: - Until now, whenever danger arose, we could avoid it through the Orca and Dragon fleets—but now that we've established a base in Europe, it's become much harder to flee so freely.
1000691328.korean: - 지금까지는 위험해지면 오르카 호와 용의 함대를 통해 위험을 회피하는 것이 가능했지만 유럽에 거점을 마련한 지금은 함부로 피난하기도 힘들어졌다.

1000691329.english: - In the worst case, we might have to abandon all our infrastructure and evacuate with only the  Bioroids and AGS units.
1000691329.korean: - 자칫했다가는 인프라는 전부 포기하고 바이오로이드와 AGS들만 데리고 피난을 해야 할 수도 있었다.

1000691330.english: - There was also the risk that the other Lemonade secretaries—already powerful as they were—might seize control of Europe from us.
1000691330.korean: - 안 그래도 세력이 강성한 다른 레모네이드 비서들에게 유럽의 지배권까지 빼앗길 위험이 있었다.

1000691332.english: There are too many variables, so even Omega won't act recklessly.
1000691332.korean: 변수가 너무 많아서 오메가도 함부로 움직이지는 않을 거예요.

1000691333.english: No matter how strained Omega and Delta's relationship was, there hasn't been a single major armed conflict between them since humanity's fall.
1000691333.korean: 아무리 오메가와 델타가 사이가 안 좋다고 하더라도 인류가 멸망한 이후부터 지금까지 본격적인 무력 충돌이 일어났던 적은 없어요.

1000691334.english: Unless Omega is certain, she won't make a move.
1000691334.korean: 확신을 가지지 않는 이상은 오메가도 함부로 움직이지는 않을 거예요.

1000691335.english: Ironically, Gamma's presence serves as a deterrent. If war were to break out between Omega and Delta, Gamma would surely side with the weaker Delta—regardless of who's right or wrong.
1000691335.korean: 의외로 감마라는 변수가 억제력을 발휘할 테니까요. 오메가와 델타 사이에 전쟁이 일어나면 세력이 약한 델타를 도우려고 들 것이 뻔하거든요. 옳고 그름을 떠나서…

1000691336.english: - However, they didn't dwell on the matter for too long.
1000691336.korean: - 하지만 너무 오랫동안 이 문제에 대해서 거론하지는 않았다.

1000691337.english: - After all, with Europe now under their control, an overwhelming number of other problems demanded their attention.
1000691337.korean: - 유럽이 우리 세력권에 들어오고 해결해야 할 문제들이 산더미처럼 쌓였기 때문이다.

1000691339.english: - There are way too many matters to deal with!

1000691340.english: - It seems Armand and Alpha won't be able to take the panel from me for a while.
1000691340.korean: - 아르망도 알파도 당분간은 어쩔 수 없이 나에게 패널을 뺏을 수가 없게 되었네.

1000691343.english: Master… please, at least keep your expression under control.

1000691344.english: Should I coordinate with Miss Armand and start managing time down to the second…
1000691344.korean: 아르망 양이랑 논의해서 초 단위로 시간을 관리해야하나…

1000691345.english: Or should I be happy to see that you're still cheerful and not despairing even in this chaos…
1000691345.korean: 아니면 이런 상황에서도 절망하지 않고 행복해 하시는 모습에 기뻐해야 하나…

1000691348.english: A Messenger of the Metal Parasites has arrived.

1000691349.english: A Messenger of the Metal Parasites?!

1000691351.english: A swarm of Metal Parasites suddenly appeared and delivered a message addressed to you, Omega.
1000691351.korean: 철충 무리가 갑자기 나타나선 오메가 님에게 메시지를 보내고 있습니다.

1000691352.english: Please take a look at the screen.

1000691353.english: The New Sun speaks to Lemonade Omega.

1000691354.english: Welcome your true master and bow your head.

1000691355.english: The sin born of ignorance may yet be forgiven through obedience.
1000691355.korean: 무지로 범한 죄는 복종으로 사함을 받을 수 있을지니.

1000691356.english: When the daydream ends, the sunset shall drown it in nightmare.
1000691356.korean: 백일몽은 해가 지면 악몽에 잠식 되리라.

1000691357.english: This is the greatest mercy a master can show.
1000691357.korean: 이는 주인으로서 보일 수 있는 최대의 자비이니.

1000691358.english: Kneel before your true master at once.

1000691359.english: You are granted only a brief reprieve — choose wisely.
1000691359.korean: 짧은 유예를 줄 터이니 올바른 선택을 하라.

1000691362.english: After that message, the Metal Parasites began to surround the occupied zone.
1000691362.korean: 저 통보 이후 철충이 점령지를 둘러 싸기 시작했습니다.

1000691363.english: Their numbers aren't large, but they could attack at any moment.
1000691363.korean: 그 수는 많지 않지만 당장이라도 공격당할 수 있습니다.

1000691364.english: Strengthen our defenses against the Metal Parasites.

1000691366.english: Do you think I've gone through all this planning just to submit to a bunch of Metal Parasites?
1000691366.korean: 철충 따위에게 복종하려고 지금까지 모든 것을 계획한 줄 알아?

1000691368.english: Tell them to resist as much as they can.

1000691369.english: Those Metal Parasites need to be taught some manners.

1000691370.english: We'll show them we don't bow to either parasites or humans!
1000691370.korean: 우리는 철충이나 인간 따위에게 복종하지 않는다는 것을 보여줘야지.

1000691371.english: - A few days after the war with Delta ended.

1000691373.english: - Considered one of the heroes of the war against Delta, she was rescued by the three sisters and spent several days sleeping as if she were unconscious, but finally woke up.
1000691373.korean: - 델타와의 전쟁에서 가장 큰 수훈자 중 하나라고 할 수 있는 그녀는 세 자매들에게 구조를 받고 며칠내내 기절한 것처럼 잠만 자다가 드디어 잠에서 깨어났다.

1000691374.english: - As soon as she woke up, she asked to speak with me.
1000691374.korean: - 잠에서 깬 그녀는 곧장 나에게 면담을 요청했다.

1000691375.english: Hello. It's the first time we've met face to face, isn't it, last human?
1000691375.korean: 안녕, 이렇게 직접 보는 건 처음이지, 마지막 인간님?

1000691376.english: - Wristcut greeted me with a twisted smile.
1000691376.korean: - 뒤틀린 미소를 지으며 나에게 인사를 건네는 리스트컷.

1000691377.english: - I couldn't help but compare her to Taylor Clothcut from our Orca.
1000691377.korean: - 나는 우리 오르카에 있는 테일러 클로스컷과 그녀를 비교할 수밖에 없었다.

1000691378.english: - Clothcut laughs brightly and causes trouble.

1000691379.english: - Wristcut smiles darkly and plots schemes.
1000691379.korean: - 음습한 미소를 지으며 계략을 짜는 리스트컷.

1000691380.english: - They've lived different lives, but I didn't expect such a drastic difference.
1000691380.korean: - 살아온 시간이 다르다고는 하지만 이렇게 차이가 심하게 날 줄이야.

1000691381.english: - No—what drove the wedge between Clothcut and Wristcut wasn't time, but Delta.
1000691381.korean: - 아니, 여기서 클로스컷과 리스트컷의 차이를 벌린 것은 시간이 아니라 델타다.

1000691382.english: So, are you planning to pounce on me? Or the other way around?

1000691383.english: - So you're a Taylor too, huh… Didn't think I'd find out like this.
1000691383.korean: - 리스트컷도 테일러구나… 이런 식으로 알게 되네.

1000691384.english: No answer? They say silence means yes.

1000691385.english: - Saying that, Wristcut began to undress—

1000691387.english: Ha ha, well, newly made ones are probably better than something as old as me, right?
1000691387.korean: 하하, 하긴 나 같은 낡은 것보다는 새로 만들어진 애들이 더 낫겠지?

1000691388.english: - I hesitated for a moment, then answered.

1000691391.english: - At my joke, Wristcut sank to the floor and burst out laughing.
1000691391.korean: - 내 농담에 리스트컷은 바닥에 주저앉고 웃음을 터트렸다.

1000691392.english: - It wasn't the forced smile she had been showing up until then; it was a genuine laugh, one that came from being genuinely amused.
1000691392.korean: - 지금까지 보여주었던 뒤틀린 웃음이 아니라 진심으로 웃겨서 웃는 웃음이었다.

1000691393.english: - After laughing for a while, Wristcut staggered to her feet.

1000691395.english: - Wristcut wiped the tears from the corners of her eyes.

1000691397.english: I'm confused about what I should do too…
1000691397.korean: 나도 지금 뭘 해야 할 지 혼란스러워서…

1000691399.english: After living by killing my sisters… finally, barely finishing my revenge….
1000691399.korean: 자매들을 죽이면서 살아온 끝에… 간신히 복수를 마치니까….

1000691400.english: It's just… everything feels so empty now.

1000691402.english: - Wristcut said that and placed her hand on her neck.
1000691402.korean: - 리스트컷은 그렇게 말하며 자신의 목에 손을 갖다 댔다.

1000691403.english: - She noticed me looking at her hands and lowered them.
1000691403.korean: - 그녀는 내가 자신의 손을 바라보는 것을 알아차리곤 손을 내렸다.

1000691404.english: Don't worry. I'm not thinking of dying.

1000691405.english: I don't know if it was self-hypnosis brought on by guilt, or if ghosts really do exist, but my dead sisters told me not to die.
1000691405.korean: 죄책감이 만들어낸 환각으로 자기 최면을 건 건지, 아니면 진짜로 유령이라는 것이 있어서 인지 모르겠지만 죽은 내 자매들이 나에게 죽지 말라고 하더라.

1000691406.english: And why do you sound so certain when you say that?
1000691406.korean: 어째서 그렇게 확신에 차서 답을 하는데?

1000691408.english: - Because I saw her kill Audrey, who had been turned into a marionette in the lab, with her own hands.
1000691408.korean: - 연구실에서 마리오네트로 개조된 오드리를 자기 손으로 죽였던 것을 봤으니까.

1000691409.english: - Because Taylor Clothcut, who's never even met Wristcut, said it with such certainty.
1000691409.korean: - 리스트컷을 본 적이 없는 테일러 클로스컷이 그렇게 확신을 했으니까.

1000691412.english: - Wristcut wiped the tears from the corners of her eyes, though for a different reason than before.
1000691412.korean: - 리스트컷은 방금 전과 다른 의미로 눈가에 맺힌 눈물을 닦았다.

1000691413.english: - Strengthening Orca's influence in Europe was an unending task.
1000691413.korean: - 오르카의 유럽에서의 영향력을 강화하는 일은 끝이 없었다.

1000691414.english: - We repaired and restored the infrastructure that had been neglected or destroyed during the war, and worked to win over groups whose loyalty was still uncertain. Fortunately, none of it required my direct involvement.
1000691414.korean: - 지금까지 정비가 되지 않거나 전쟁 중에 파괴된 인프라를 정비, 복구했고, 민심 장악이 덜 된 집단을 최대한 회유했다. 다행스럽게도 나까지 나설 일은 없었다.

1000691415.english: - Clashes with the Metal Parasites became more frequent, but unless it turned into a full-scale war, they posed little threat to Orca's elite.
1000691415.korean: - 철충과의 충돌도 잦아졌지만 본격적인 전면전이 아니라면 오르카의 정예에게는 큰 위협이 되지 못했다.

1000691417.english: - Even as Orca expanded its domain across Europe, operations ran smoothly—thanks in no small part to the competence of every member.
1000691417.korean: - 오르카라는 집단에서 유럽으로 세력권이 넓어졌음에도 큰 무리 없이 업무를 볼 수 있었던 건 대원들 모두가 유능한 이유도 있었지만.

1000691418.english: Power plants don't need to be built any more for the time being.
1000691418.korean: 발전소는 당분간은 더 건설할 필요가 없어.

1000691419.english: That is, unless you plan to operate a Marionette production factory.
1000691419.korean: 마리오네트 생산 공장을 작동시킬 생각이 없다면 말이야.

1000691420.english: Likewise, the farmland we just reclaimed should be enough for self-sufficiency.
1000691420.korean: 그와 똑같이 농지도 지금 개간한 것만으로도 충분히 자급자족이 가능할 거야.

1000691421.english: The thing we need to worry about most right now is other Lemonades' intelligence assets learning about the situation in Europe.
1000691421.korean: 지금 제일 걱정해야 하는 건 다른 레모네이드의 정보 자산이 유럽의 상황을 파악하는 걸 거야.

1000691422.english: Given Omega and Gamma's temperaments, once they grasp Europe's situation they'll come marching in immediately.
1000691422.korean: 오메가나 감마의 성격을 생각했을 때 유럽의 상황을 파악하면 당장 쳐들어오겠지.

1000691423.english: I recommend investing resources into counterintelligence.

1000691424.english: - It's because Wristcut, who managed Europe under Delta, has agreed to fully cooperate with us.
1000691424.korean: - 델타 밑에서 유럽을 관리하던 리스트컷이 우리에게 전면적으로 협력하기로 했기 때문이다.

1000691425.english: - No, she's decided to go beyond just collaborating and join Orca.
1000691425.korean: - 아니, 협력을 넘어서 오르카에 합류하기로 했다.

1000691426.english: Ah, but keep me out of combat.
1000691426.korean: 아, 하지만 난 전투에서는 빼 줘.

1000691427.english: There's no one who knows Europe as well as I do; if I die, it would be a disaster, right?
1000691427.korean: 지금 유럽을 나만큼 잘 아는 사람이 없는데 내가 죽거나 하면 큰일이잖아?

1000691428.english: - We agreed with Wristcut's proposal — the gains from keeping her on internal affairs far outweighed sending her into combat.
1000691428.korean: - 우리는 리스트컷의 의견에 동의했다. 리스트컷을 전투에 투입해서 생기는 이득과 리스트컷이 내정에 집중했을 때의 이득을 비교했을 때 후자가 월등했으니까.

1000691430.english: - Just as I was about to get ready for bed, Wristcut dropped by my room.
1000691430.korean: - 슬슬 자기위해서 준비를 하던 때 리스트컷이 내 방을 방문했다.

1000691431.english: So, shall we talk about what's going on in the world lately? Or maybe about the weather?
1000691431.korean: 글쎄, 요즘 세상 돌아가는 이야기나 할까? 아니면 날씨 이야기는 어때?

1000691432.english: …Can't you just drop by without a reason?

1000691438.english: The problem is that nothing's happening.

1000691439.english: I made no small contribution in the war against Delta, didn't I?
1000691439.korean: 이번 델타와의 전쟁에서 내가 기여한 게 적지 않지?

1000691440.english: Then I'm in a position to ask for something, right?
1000691440.korean: 그러면 내가 뭔가를 요구해도 되는 입장이지?

1000691443.english: There's also something I want to do for you, who helped me get my revenge.
1000691443.korean: 나도 내 복수를 도와준 너에게 해주고 싶은 것도 있고.

1000691444.english: - It was only after hearing that much that I realized what Wristcut wanted.
1000691444.korean: - 여기까지 듣고 나서야 나는 리스트컷이 뭘 원하는지 알아차렸다.

1000691445.english: Well… if you don't like it, then there's nothing I can do.
1000691445.korean: 뭐… 네가 싫다면 어쩔 수 없고.

1000691446.english: Getting old and turning into a gloomy spinster—kya!

1000691447.english: - I picked Wristcut up in my arms.

1000691448.english: - Startled by my sudden move, Wristcut let out a cute little scream.
1000691448.korean: - 나의 기습에 리스트컷은 귀여운 비명소리를 냈다.

1000691449.english: - As she was laid down on the bed, Wristcut asked,

1000691450.english: I didn't take a number, is that okay?

1000691452.english: - There wasn't a trace of her usual cynicism on Wristcut lying on the bed.
1000691452.korean: - 침대 위의 리스트컷에게선 염세적인 모습은 전혀 찾아볼 수 없었다.

1000691453.english: - When I woke up in the morning, Wristcut was fast asleep, her face at ease.
1000691453.korean: - 아침에 일어났을 때 리스트컷은 편안한 얼굴로 잠들어 있었다.

1000691455.english: - The war with Delta came to an end, and the commendation and promotion ceremony was held.
1000691455.korean: - 델타와의 전쟁이 끝나고 수훈식 및 진급식이 열렸다.

1000691456.english: - Many members were promoted for their performance during the war.
1000691456.korean: - 많은 대원들이 전쟁에서 활약을 하고 진급을 했다.

1000691457.english: - There were many who distinguished themselves, but the one who stood out the most was, of course…
1000691457.korean: - 활약한 대원은 여럿이지만 가장 도드라진 활약을 펼친 대원은 역시…

1000691459.english: I, Draculina, don't like the idea of someone ranking above me, but…
1000691459.korean: 이 드라큐리나 님 위에 누군가 있는 게 마음에는 안 들지만…

1000691460.english: I have to admit it—you've earned it, with all the running around and hardship you went through.
1000691460.korean: 너는 인정할 수밖에 없네. 그렇게 뛰어다니고 고생했으니.

1000691462.english: It was worth sending you to the commanders' meeting in my place.
1000691462.korean: 저 대신 지휘관 회의에 출석시킨 보람이 있네요.

1000691463.english: The result of accepting your role and focusing on your duties.
1000691463.korean: 자기 처지를 받아들이고 업무에 집중한 결과임.

1000691464.english: Congratulations on your promotion, Brigade Commander.

1000691467.english: - Congrats on the promotion, Lumber Jane.

1000691468.english: - Not only securing the bridgehead, but leading the combat engineers in securing routes of advance, constructing trenches and defensive works, destroying enemy facilities, and building field installations.
1000691468.korean: - 교두보 확보뿐만 아니라 전투공병들을 이끌고 기동로 확보와 참호 및 방호시설 구축, 적 시설 파괴, 야전 시설 건설.

1000691469.english: - And beyond combat, she made a huge contribution to the engineers' qualitative and quantitative expansion, for example by recommending commanders for engineer units.
1000691469.korean: - 그리고 전투 외에도 공병 부대 지휘관을 추천하는 등 공병 부대의 질적, 양적 확대에 지대한 공헌을 했다.

1000691470.english: - I couldn't even imagine anyone other than Lumber Jane as commander of the newly reorganized engineer brigade.
1000691470.korean: - 럼버제인 말고 다른 대원이 새로 개편된 공병여단의 지휘관으로 있는 것을 상상할 수도 없었다.

1000691472.english: - It was the humility befitting someone promoted to brigadier.

1000691473.english: - A war crimes tribunal was also held.

1000691478.english: - Our Strongholds did suffer damage from Nashorn's attack, but it wasn't irreparable.
1000691478.korean: - 나스호른의 공격에 우리 스트롱홀드들이 피해를 입기는 했지만 복구가 불가능한 피해는 아니었다.

1000691479.english: - In this era, there was no law to define war crimes—and even if there were, Nashorn's actions would have been considered legitimate under the old laws of war.
1000691479.korean: - 이런 시대에 전쟁 범죄를 규정할 법이 있는 것도 아니었고, 있다고 하더라도 나스호른이 한 행위는 옛시대의 전쟁법으로 봐도 정당한 행위였다.

1000691480.english: - Then why did Nashorn accuse herself…?

1000691481.english: Commander, I'd like to decline my promotion.

1000691482.english: The reason you wanted to promote me to brigadier was probably because the Armored Maiden unit didn't have a formal commander, and you intended to appoint me to that position, correct?
1000691482.korean: 저를 준장으로 진급시키려는 이유가 아머드 메이든이라는 부대에 정식 지휘관이 부재해서 저를 정식 지휘관으로 임명하려고 그랬던 것 아닙니까?

1000691483.english: But now that Commander Nashorn has officially joined Orca, there's no need for me to take command.
1000691483.korean: 하지만 나스호른 대장이 정식으로 오르카에 합류했으니 구태여 제가 지휘관이 될 필요는 없지 않습니까.

1000691484.english: I'll serve as her adjutant instead.

1000691485.english: - Not only I, but the other commanders agreed with Bloody Panther's opinion.
1000691485.korean: - 나뿐만 아니라 다른 지휘관들은 블러디 팬서의 의견에 동의했다.

1000691487.english: I don't think it's appropriate to appoint someone who was an enemy until just recently as the commander of a unit.
1000691487.korean: 얼마 전까지 적이었던 저를 한 부대의 지휘관으로 임명하는 게 바람직한 일은 아닌 거 같습니다.

1000691488.english: - It seemed like a reasonable argument, but…

1000691489.english: It's okay. Commander Nashorn was deceived by Delta and ended up fighting us, after all.
1000691489.korean: 괜찮아요. 나스호른 대장님도 델타에게 속아서 우리랑 싸웠잖아요.

1000691490.english: She's a Bioroid too—she can't disobey the Commander's orders anyway.
1000691490.korean: 어차피 대장도 바이오로이드인 이상 사령관의 명령을 거부할 수 없잖아.

1000691491.english: Let's be honest, you just don't want the hassle of being a commander. This is you dodging responsibility.
1000691491.korean: 사실은 대장 노릇 하기 귀찮아서 그러는 거잖아. 이거 책임회피야.

1000691492.english: - No matter how I looked at it, it really did seem like she just didn't want to take on the role.
1000691492.korean: - 아무리 봐도 대장 직책을 떠맡기 싫어서 그런 것 같았다.

1000691493.english: - I thought it might be better to appoint someone else rather than force the job on someone unwilling, but…
1000691493.korean: - 싫어하는 사람 억지로 시키기보다는 다른 사람 시키는 것이 맞지 않나 싶었지만…

1000691494.english: I've been handling most of the work anyway.
1000691494.korean: 어차피 대부분의 일은 제가 하지 않았습니까.

1000691495.english: Just hold the position, and I'll keep running things like before!
1000691495.korean: 옛날처럼 제가 대리로 일할 테니까 그냥 자리만이라도 지켜주십쇼!

1000691496.english: - At Bloody Panther's words, Nashorn finally agreed to be appointed as commander of the Armored Maiden.
1000691496.korean: - 블러디 팬서의 말에 나스호른은 결국 아머드 메이든의 대장에 임명되는 것에 동의했다.

1000691497.english: - Naturally, the war crime charges were dropped.

1000691498.english: - Strange… why does she hate working so much?
1000691498.korean: - 이상하다… 왜 일 하는 것을 싫어하지?

1000691500.english: - There were many spoils of war, but Delta's Kestos Himās was not among them.
1000691500.korean: - 전쟁의 전리품은 많았지만 델타의 케스토스 히마스는 우리의 전리품이 되지 못했다.

1000691501.english: The laboratory we destroyed midway… that was Kestos Himās.
1000691501.korean: 우리가 중간에 파괴했던 연구소가 케스토스 히마스였어요.

1000691503.english: The entire structure of the lab resembled Omega's Kestos Himās.
1000691503.korean: 연구소 전체의 구조가 오메가의 케스토스 히마스와 비슷했거든요.

1000691504.english: Ah—by "resembled," I mean functionally, not in physical appearance.
1000691504.korean: 아, 여기서 비슷하다는 것은 형태적인 구조라기보다는 기능적인 구조를 의미해요.

1000691505.english: Of course, it wasn't completely identical. The most notable difference was that its input system included a feature allowing it to decompose and analyze material directly.
1000691505.korean: 물론 전부 똑같지는 않았어요. 무엇보다도 특이한 것은 입력 장치에 별도로 물질을 분해하고 분석할 수 있는 기능이 추가되어 있었어요.

1000691506.english: If it had been mobile, that function would've only added unnecessary bulk and weight, but since it was a building-type system, that wasn't a drawback.
1000691506.korean: 이동식이었으면 쓸 데 없이 부피랑 무게만 늘리는 기능이었겠지만 건물의 형태를 한 덕분에 그런 것은 단점이 되지 않았던 거죠.

1000691507.english: Its main capability, of course, was modifying living organisms at the molecular level.
1000691507.korean: 주요 기능은 역시나 생물을 분자 단위에서 개조할 수 있는 거죠.

1000691510.english: It's been completely modified for Delta's exclusive use, so it's hard for us to utilize.
1000691510.korean: 델타 전용으로 완전히 개조된 덕분에 우리가 쓰기 힘들어요.

1000691511.english: Unless you're as versed in biology as Delta…

1000691512.english: And unless you disregard life as easily as she did, even repairing it wouldn't make it truly usable.
1000691512.korean: 그리고 델타만큼 생명을 경시하지 않으면 수리를 한다고 해도 제대로 쓰지 못할 거예요.

1000691513.english: - Knowing the demonic creations Delta produced, we could never bring ourselves to use the Kestos Himās – Delta Type.
1000691513.korean: - 델타의 악마적인 창조물을 알고 있는 이상 케스토스 히마스 델타 타입을 쓰지는 못할 것이다.

1000691514.english: - At my words, Azaz showed not the slightest hint of disappointment.
1000691514.korean: - 내 말에 아자즈는 조금의 아쉬움도 보이지 않았다.

1000691515.english: - Even she—someone fanatically devoted to technology—knew where to draw the line.
1000691515.korean: - 기술에 대해 광적인 애호를 보이는 그녀도 최소한의 선은 지킬 줄 알았다.

1000691516.english: - The final battle with Delta didn't end with just Orca's victory over her forces.
1000691516.korean: - 델타와의 결전은 오르카와 델타 세력 간의 전투로만 끝나지 않았다.

1000691517.english: - After confirming Delta's death, those who bore personal grudges against her seemed… liberated, somehow.
1000691517.korean: - 델타의 시체를 확인한 이후 델타와 개인적인 원한이 있는 대원들은 무언가 해방된 것 같은 모습을 보였다.

1000691521.english: - There could be only one reason for that.
1000691521.korean: - 바르그의 눈가가 저렇게 될 일은 하나뿐이겠지.
